programme.desc: After the divorce, Yildiz begins a new stage on television with Halitcan, while Nadir tries to get closer and closer to her. At the same time, Yigit's return with a new girlfriend definitely breaks Lila's heart.

programme.title: Quarto 309
programme.desc: Songül thinks the messages are from Necip and misinterprets the situation. Samet and Songül meet again, but the result is not the best. Sadi and Fikret prepare for the meeting. Yildiz and Betül pay an unexpected visit.

programme.title: Quarto 309
programme.desc: Onur can't understand why Lale didn't react after what happened to Pelinsu in the woods. Yildiz and Fikret fear that Onur will become too attached to Lale. Kurtulus finds a way to stay under the same roof with Nilüfer.

programme.title: Quarto 309
programme.desc: Yildiz invites Songül and her daughters to brunch because she wants to propose to Lale. Lale is still upset with Onur. On the other hand, Onur tries to help Pelinsu deal with the situation because Pelinsu really doesn't want to lose Onur.

programme.title: Chris Watts: Confessions of a Murderer
programme.desc: When Chris Watts, seemingly calm but with a subtle smile, pleaded with television cameras for the safe return of his pregnant wife, Shanann, and their two missing young daughters, dark secrets lurked just beneath the surface.

programme.title: Doomsday Mom: The Lori Vallow Story
programme.desc: It is based on the true story of Lori Vallow, who gained national attention when her children, JJ and Tylee, were reported missing from their Idaho home in the fall of 2019.

programme.title: A Business Woman
programme.desc: A single mother creates a luxury escort service that matches beautiful young women with the richest and most powerful men in town.

programme.title: I love you to death
programme.desc: The symbiotic relationship between mother Camile, who suffers from Munchausen syndrome, and her daughter Esme ends tragically when Esme discovers the truth about her true physical condition.

programme.title: The Curious Cook: Dying for Chocolate
programme.desc: Goldy Berry is a catering entrepreneur from Colorado who unexpectedly finds herself in the role of investigator as she tries to uncover the mysterious death of a friend. With time running out, he forms an unlikely partnership with a detective to find the killer.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's New Diary
programme.sub-title: Bridget, a clumsy and complex journalist, suspects the infidelity of her partner with whom she has been in a relationship for just
programme.desc: Finally, Bridget found love with Mark, who is caring and dedicated. But Bridget can't help but feel jealous when Mark has a stunning new intern. To complicate matters, Daniel, the former boss, is returning...

programme.title: A New Hope
programme.desc: Birdee Pruitt seems to have everything it takes to be happy: she's pretty, she's married to an attractive man who was her high school sweetheart, and she has an intelligent, sensitive daughter. But life together starts to go wrong and Birdee decides to get a divorce.

programme.title: O Serial Killer de Long Island
programme.desc: The Long Island Serial Killer: A Mother's Hunt for Justice tells the story of Mari Gilbert's search for the truth about what happened to her daughter Shannan, a casual companion who disappeared after a “date” on Long Island.

programme.title: My First Kiss 2
programme.desc: Vada is now 13 years old and leads a quiet life. When she decides to do a school project about the mother she never met, she quickly realizes that she doesn't know anything about her and leaves for Los Angeles, looking for her uncle, who might be able to help her.

programme.title: Men in Black 3
programme.desc: A very dangerous alien has escaped from the high-security prison on the Moon with the help of his exuberant admirer. The alien is called "Boris the Animal", a ruthless being that Agent K. captured in 1969 and whom they must face again. Unaware of Boris's escape, K. (Tommy Lee Jones) and J. (Will Smith) continue carrying out their work as M.I.B. agents. ridding the city of dangerous aliens or aliens with petty crimes. At the beginning of a new day, J. can't find his partner anywhere, but that's not the most worrying thing, no one at the agency seems to know of his existence. In his investigation he will realize that Boris has made a jump in time and has killed K. completely changing history and causing the Earth to be unprotected against an imminent alien attack. J. will have to travel back in time to recover his partner and save the future of the planet. Specifically, he will travel to the year 1969, when K. is still a young agent with a certain sense of humor. Together they will try to catch the evil Boris. To do this, they will have the intermittent and relative help of a character who is capable of seeing all the space-time lines of the Universe at every moment. The film began filming without a definitive script, so production was delayed due to all the rewrites that were done until it was completed. For the role of Boris, the participation of actor Sacha Baron Cohen, known for his leading roles in the films "Borat" and "The Dictator", was reconsidered. But in the end the role was awarded to Jemaine Clement. The makeup he wore to embody the alien took four and a half hours to apply each day of filming. Will Smith had his ups and downs with the film's director, Barry Sonnenfeld, because he wanted the person to play the role of the colonel's son to be his son, Jaden Smith, and not Cayen Martin, who ultimately got the role.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: Alan Parrish is a boy who accidentally finds a board game called Jumanji and convinces his friend Sarah to try it, but very strange events begin to occur and the game will catch them and change their lives. By throwing the dice, Alan is transported to a parallel world, where he will not be able to leave until the game ends, but circumstances cause Sarah to leave and Alan is trapped for 26 years in that other world until two new children find the game and start playing.

programme.title: my sister's husband
programme.desc: Richard is a Cambridge professor who will find himself involved in an unexpected love triangle. After getting a young and attractive American student pregnant, he will also meet her sister, an eccentric novelist.

programme.title: Kill Santa
programme.desc: Chris, also known as Santa Claus, is forced to team up with the military to save his business. To make matters a little worse, he finds himself involved in a deadly battle against a hitman hired by a 12-year-old boy.

programme.title: Adoptive parents
programme.desc: Coline and André are in perfect harmony with their daughter, Garance, and their son-in-law Harold. But Garance separates from Harold and orders his parents to never see him again, the in-laws cannot do it. They will have to lead a double life to continue seeing their beloved son-in-law.

programme.title: I continue like God
programme.desc: Popular Buffalo reporter Evan Baxter has just become a congressman, so he moves with his family to a luxurious development in Huntsville, Virginia. Everything seems to be going well for the Baxter family, who are focused on adjusting to their new luxury-filled life away from their hometown. Evan is expectant since in his first days as a congressman, the powerful Congressman Long proposes that he work together with his team in the development of a bill, which makes him think that God has heard his prayers and that professional success has finally knocked on his door. However, Evan's future begins to falter when one day a man who calls himself God appears at his house and entrusts him with an important mission of biblical proportions: build an ark to save a pair of each animal species and thus save humanity from the approaching universal flood. Even though Evan is skeptical and considers the man crazy, when pairs of all kinds of animals begin to arrive in his garden and different suppliers begin to knock on his door bringing enormous quantities of wood and other materials, Evan is forced to believe in God and forcibly accept the order. Resigned and with the help of his three children and the manual 'Build Arks for Dummies', Evan begins his important task. During the process, many will consider Evan crazy and begin to call him 'The Noah of New York' as he will undergo a significant transformation, both physically and mentally.

programme.title: Kill Santa
programme.desc: Chris, also known as Santa Claus, is forced to team up with the military to save his business. To make matters a little worse, he finds himself involved in a deadly battle against a hitman hired by a 12-year-old boy.

programme.title: Men in Black: International
programme.desc: Sweet Molly Wright has a life-changing experience as a child; Help an alien who is being sought by two agents of the MiB organization escape. Twenty years after what happened, and after much physical and intellectual preparation, she manages to present herself as a candidate to join the CIA and the FBI, but no one believes her story and she is rejected for her delusions with alien life. Despite this, Molly does not give up and manages to track down an alien landing that leads her directly to the MiB headquarters in New York City. His adventure begins from that moment, he leaves life as he knows it behind and becomes a testing agent for the MiB branch in the city of London. The tenacious and cunning Molly has to prove her abilities to stay in the MiB. To do this, he manages to get involved in a difficult mission as the assistant of the presumptuous Agent H. Both agents will have to iron out their rough edges and work as a team to solve two serious problems; the appearance of a mole that would call into question the impeccable reputation of the MiB and the threat of two alien beings that endangers life on Earth and the balance of the universe. Men in Black: International is a new installment of the famous Men in Black franchise. It becomes the fourth film and spin-off of the original MIB saga. It stars Chris Hemsworth, Tessa Thompson and Liam Neeson and much of its filming took place in the cities of New York, Morocco, Italy and London. The actor and producer Felix Gary Gray was in charge of directing this film.

programme.title: Cross-fire
programme.desc: After witnessing the brutal murder of a store owner and his son, firefighter Jeremy Coleman miraculously escapes with his life. Having witnessed the murders and being forced to testify against the gang of gangsters that carried them out, specifically against their leader, David Hagan, he is integrated into the witness protection program under the supervision of the Marshalls. Agent Talia will be in charge of protecting Jeremy's life from this cruel murderer. Inspector Mike Calla will be in charge of handling Coleman's case, a man who precisely lost his wife at the hands of the same gangster who committed this crime, and who since then has not stopped searching for him to do justice. The problem comes when Jeremy Coleman's new identity is compromised, so the firefighter is forced to take action to recover his life and save those of his loved ones.

programme.title: A town called Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Harry Dalton (Pierce Brosnan) is one of the most renowned volcanologists at the United States Geological Survey. Four years after his partner's death during a volcanic eruption in Colombia, Harry receives a call from his boss, Paul Dyfrus (Charles Hallahan), to discuss the unusual behavior of a hitherto dormant volcano. Meanwhile, the city of Dante's Peak, located on one of the volcano's plains, is celebrating being named the second most desired place to live in the country. Harry begins his investigation in the area and discovers clear signs that the volcano could soon erupt. The scientist wants to put the city on alert, but the inhabitants have economic interests that could be harmed if they heed Harry's warnings. Everyone ignores it until it's too late. The director, Roger Donaldson, was drawn to the project because he was once a geology student. Many of the film's special effects were done practically. The ash from the volcano was actually very fine shavings of newspaper. According to an interview with Donaldson, the camera that Harry Dalton uses during his investigation is actually owned by Pierce Brosnan. Initially the main role was going to be played by Michael Douglas. Most of the film's exteriors were shot in Wallas, Idaho. It was also filmed on Dante's Peak, adding certain details with digital technology.

programme.title: Son of a Gun
programme.desc: Young JR is accused and imprisoned for a minor crime. When he enters prison he discovers the harshness of life in prison, but he will soon become the protégé of Brendan Lynch, one of the most dangerous prisoners in Australia. However, that protection will have a price and Lynch, along with his team, will have plans for JR when he is released from prison: help them with their escape plan.

programme.title: The jury
programme.desc: A young New Orleans widow files a civil lawsuit against a powerful corporate consortium whom she blames for her husband's death. Thus, a multimillion-dollar case is launched. Judicial thriller based on a novel by John Grisham, a best-selling writer who is well versed in all the ins and outs of United States law.

programme.title: Django Unchained
programme.desc: Texas. Two years before the American Civil War broke out. King Schultz is a German bounty hunter who is tracking murderers to collect for their heads, and he promises the black slave Django to set him free on the condition that he helps him catch them. Django accepts, since his greatest wish is to go rescue his wife Broomhilda, a slave who is on the plantation of landowner Calvin Candie. This film, written and directed by Quentin Tarantino, is a western film with references to the spaghetti western genre; genre through which I wanted to portray a story about slavery like this one. Tarantino is a renowned American director, producer and screenwriter whose films are characterized by addressing non-linear stories, violence, Grindhouse influences, kung fu and spaghetti westerns. Starring Jamie Foxx ('Bait', 'Collateral'), Christoph Waltz ('Inglourious Basterds', 'Dorian'), Leonardo DiCaprio ('Titanic', 'The Great Gatsby') and Samuel L. Jackson ('S.W.A.T.', 'Star Wars'); The film is a mix of good dialogue, rhythm, irony, and an impeccable soundtrack that captures the viewer's attention at all times.

programme.title: Crank: High voltage
programme.desc: Hitman Chelios faces off against a Chinese gangster who has stolen his virtually indestructible heart and replaced it with a sophisticated battery-powered device that requires frequent bursts of electricity to continue functioning.

programme.title: Demolition
programme.desc: A successful executive struggles to understand his emotional disconnection after the sudden and tragic death of his wife in a car accident. Despite his father-in-law's pressure to recover, Davis remains bewildered and reflects this by compulsively disassembling increasingly conspicuous objects around him.

programme.title: the ghostbusters
programme.desc: Dr. Peter Venkman (Bill Murray) takes advantage of his research scholarship at the University to torture boys and conquer girls who take psychosensory tests. He is actually a very capable scientist who resorts to logic rather than superstition, but he uses the girls' gullibility to flirt with them. His friends, Dr. Raymond Stantz (Dan Aykroyd) and Dr. Egon Spengler (Harold Ramis), carry out ectoplasmic studies to investigate the possible existence of ghosts and even capture one for later study. The first time they have a warning about the real presence of a ghost in a library, they don't know how to deal with it and run away. It is after they are kicked out of the University that they decide to mortgage Stantz's house and start their own ghost hunting company. Over time they manage to develop machines that trap ectoplasmic beings for later study. But the jobs that come to the office are nonsense with what is about to fall on them. A young woman who lives alone begins to have truly shocking paranormal experiences in her home and decides to call the Ghostbusters to help her. The investigation will take them further than they ever thought they would go, seeing things they would never have dreamed of seeing. In Aykroyd's original script, the story took place in a future where there would be teams of ghostbusters like there are today of paramedics or firefighters. But the budget studied for that type of film amounted to three hundred million dollars and Aykroyd was forced to adapt it to the scientific reality of the 1980s. Initially other actors were going to play some of the most important roles in the film: John Candy was going to be Louis Tully, John Belushi was going to be Dr. Peter Venkman, and the role of Winston was written specifically for Eddie Murphy.

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: The Ghostbusters discover that New York is once again headed toward supernatural disaster, with a river of ectoplasmic matter running beneath the city and an old sorcerer attempting to take possession of a baby. to be born again.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: Alan Parrish is a boy who accidentally finds a board game called Jumanji and convinces his friend Sarah to try it, but very strange events begin to occur and the game will catch them and change their lives. By throwing the dice, Alan is transported to a parallel world, where he will not be able to leave until the game ends, but circumstances cause Sarah to leave and Alan is trapped for 26 years in that other world until two new children find the game and start playing.

programme.title: The jewel of the Nile
programme.desc: Jack and Joan are about to get married on a boat on the high seas. But suddenly a horde of pirates attack them and set fire to the facilities. Joan and Jack fight off the tenacious pirates when they realize there is only one place left on the lifeboat. Joan asks Jack to take care of it since she is going to die soon of tuberculosis and it is not worth the man dying. When he leaves she wonders what the buccaneers will do and what her future will be... But this incredible adventure was only part of Joan Wilder's fantasy with which she intends to start writing her new book, in which she is stuck. She has been married to Jack Colton for some time and after the incredible adventures they have had, they find themselves stuck in a port in the south of France bound for Greece, although she would prefer to go to New York. That same afternoon, at a book signing, Joan meets Omar, a benevolent ruler of an Eastern country called Kadir. He invites her to his palace so she can feel like a queen while he writes, but Jack is not amused by this proposition. Quarreled, they decide to separate and take some time while she finishes her book. Suddenly, Joan witnesses how a man named Tarak tries to murder Omar in front of her. For his part, Jack meets a man named Ralph at the port who seeks revenge for his time spent in prison. They both see how a man approaches: it is Tarak, the murderer, who comes to ask them for help. He confesses to them that Omar is actually a horrible dictator who has stolen their most precious treasure, "The Jewel of the Nile." Jack decides to help him when he sees his ship explode and understands that the sheikh intended to kill him and thus, in the process, rescues his wife. But the sheik has great power and it will be very difficult for Jack and Ralph to get their way. The actors who play the tribesmen: Arak, Barak, Karak, Sarak and Tarak, the same ones from the troop of jugglers in The Brothers Karamazov.

programme.title: my sister's husband
programme.desc: Richard is a Cambridge professor who will find himself involved in an unexpected love triangle. After getting a young and attractive American student pregnant, he will also meet her sister, an eccentric novelist.

programme.title: Men in Black 3

Will Smith had his ups and downs with the film's director, Barry Sonnenfeld, because he wanted the person to play the role of the colonel's son to be his son, Jaden Smith, and not Cayen Martin, who ultimately got the role.

programme.title: Pitch Black
programme.desc: During an interstellar trip, a space freighter breaks down and has to make an emergency landing on a mysterious planet. The survivors will have to face some strange creatures. A very dangerous assassin, Riddick, who was part of the charge, flees the place, leaving the survivors in danger of nocturnal creatures that come to the surface when the planet's three suns are darkened due to an eclipse.

programme.title: John Q
programme.desc: John Q. Archibald is an ordinary man, who works for hours in a factory to support his family. John lives focused on his wife Denise and his son Michael, to whom he dedicates practically all of his time. Everything goes wrong when their son falls ill and the hospital tells them that he needs a heart transplant as soon as possible, otherwise he will die. The child does not have medical insurance that covers the intervention, so he is outside the allocation plan and the prognosis is very negative. Seeing how his son awaits the fatal outcome and without money with which to face the operation, John decides to make a decision that may save his life, even if it involves breaking some limits.

programme.title: Llamaradas
programme.desc: He was a child when he witnessed the death of his father in an act of service during a fire. Twenty years later, Brian is also a firefighter in Chicago. He is in a difficult trial period led by his brother Stephen who is very demanding of him. Both brothers will try to overcome disputes and memories of the past while an arsonist sets fires in the city.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels: The Edge
programme.desc: Second part of Charlie's Angels. Dylan, Natalie and Alex are sent by their boss on a new mission: locate a group of rings that have been stolen from the Department of Justice. This device allows its owner to know the list of people who are in the FBI's Witness Protection Program. When the first witnesses begin to appear dead, the Angels will have to use all their ingenuity to solve the case. An exceptional cameo can be seen in this film: one of the original Angels, Jaclyn Smith.

programme.title: Better... impossible
programme.desc: Melvin Udall is a novelist with obsessive-compulsive disorder that, among other things, causes him to walk down the street without stepping on sidewalk lines or to use new cutlery every time he eats. But Melvin also feels proud of his ability to offend and irritate others, especially his neighbor Simon Nye, a homosexual artist whom the writer always attacks with his viperous tongue. Melvin has breakfast every day in a cafeteria and there is only one waitress who can put up with him, Carol, a single mother struggling to raise her asthmatic son. The fate of these characters will be intertwined because of a dog and a trip.

programme.title: A doctor in the countryside
programme.desc: Doctor Jean-Pierre is the only doctor in a small village in rural France. But an illness causes Nathalie to replace him at his job for a time.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.: Harrelson's Men
programme.desc: Jim Street, former member of the S.W.A.T, was expelled from the team along with his partner Brian Gamble, due to a controversial decision he made in a robbery with hostages case. For Street, his work is his life and he is looking for the opportunity to wear the uniform again. That opportunity comes when Dan "Hondo" Harrelson, commander of the team, must recruit and train five high-level police officers for a new special weapons and tactics team. After a few hard weeks of training, the team goes into action: a drug lord offers a large sum of money to whoever frees him from police control. The S.W.A.T. team He must guard the enemy while being chased by a band of mercenaries. Film version of the famous 70's television series "Harrelson's Men".

programme.title: Mutiny on board
programme.desc: In 1787, the ship Bounty made a dangerous journey of 50,000 kilometers. After a month of sailing under strong storms, Captain William Bligh allows the crew to dock on a remote island so that they can rest.

programme.title: the ghostbusters
programme.desc: Dr. Peter Venkman (Bill Murray) takes advantage of his research scholarship at the University to torture boys and conquer girls who take psychosensory tests. He is actually a very capable scientist who resorts to logic rather than superstition, but he uses the girls' gullibility to flirt with them. His friends, Dr. Raymond Stantz (Dan Aykroyd) and Dr. Egon Spengler (Harold Ramis), carry out ectoplasmic studies to investigate the possible existence of ghosts and even capture one for later study. The first time they have a warning about the real presence of a ghost in a library, they don't know how to deal with it and run away. It is after they are kicked out of the University that they decide to mortgage Stantz's house and start their own ghost hunting company. Over time they manage to develop machines that trap ectoplasmic beings for later study. But the jobs that come to the office are nonsense with what is about to fall on them. programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: The Ghostbusters discover that New York is once again headed toward supernatural disaster, with a river of ectoplasmic matter running beneath the city and an old sorcerer attempting to take possession of a baby. to be born again.

programme.title: The Blind Side (Un sueño posible)
programme.desc: A young homeless African-American finds refuge in a white family, who will support him in his desire to become an American football player.

programme.title: Absolute power
programme.desc: Luther, a specialist in grand thefts, plans to rob the mansion of a tycoon who is on vacation in the Caribbean. However, the victim's wife appears unexpectedly.

programme.title: Criminal
programme.desc: Dr. Franks is a prestigious neurosurgeon who is going to carry out a unique and very dangerous operation: implant the memories, secrets and abilities of CIA agent Bill Pope who has just died in the mind of another person. This is a cutting-edge method that is presented as the only way the agency has to recover confidential information of vital importance from Pope's memory that compromises the national security of the United States. The problem is that the only candidate to become the vessel of the deceased's mind is Jericho Stewart, a dangerous and unpredictable convict who is on death row awaiting execution and who has a brain abnormality that makes him perfect for the mission. However, no one can assure that the result is the most effective way to stop a terrible conspiracy that is hanging over the country.

programme.title: The Kaiser's Last Kiss
programme.desc: A German officer is sent to Holland to determine whether the British Secret Service has infiltrated the home of Kaiser Wilhelm II during the start of World War II, but begins a dangerous and lethal romance with a young Dutch Jew with consequences neither of them could have foreseen.

programme.title: The client
programme.desc: Mark Sway is an eleven-year-old boy who witnesses the death of a mafia lawyer. Before dying, he confesses some very important information to him. But, fearing retaliation, Mark doesn't dare tell the FBI.

programme.title: Deuda de sangre
programme.desc: While recovering from a heart transplant, a retired FBI officer returns to duty when his own blood tests give him a clue to catch a serial killer.

programme.title: The agent
programme.desc: In the year 2030, the world is in a permanent state of economic recession and faces serious environmental problems, so all those citizens who are unproductive are exiled to a colony.

programme.title: Musical: All Messi's goals in the league 2015/16
Musical: All the goals of the little boy Suárez
Musical: All the goals of Neymar jr. of the 2015/16 league
Musical: All the goals of Dani Alves

It has been proven! The film of the 2015/16 season

BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: The Media Show
programme.desc: The Trump administration has issued subpoenas to several New York Times journalists following reporting about alleged security concerns involving President Trump's new Air Force One, a plane donated by Qatar. The case has prompted debate over the balance between protecting national security and safeguarding press freedom. Claire Atkinson, founder of The Media Mix newsletter, outlines the latest developments. The BBC's latest annual report comes as the corporation warns that public service media is facing a period of jeopardy. The figures show a further fall in licence fee-paying households, alongside changing audience habits and continued financial pressures as charter renewal negotiations continue. Rhodri Talfan Davies, the BBC's deputy director-general, sets out the corporation's position. Broadcaster and author Iain Dale reflects on a career spanning politics, publishing, blogging and radio following the publication of his memoir Have I Said Too Much?. The interview covers the enduring appeal of the radio phone-in, the influence of social media on broadcasting, and changing relationships between politicians and traditional media.

programme.title: Newsday

programme.title: Tech Now

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: Clive Myrie’s Caribbean Adventure
programme.desc: Clive travels to the Dominican Republic’s capital city, Santo Domingo, where baseball is a way of life. He meets one of the country’s top scouts, who gives him much-needed advice on his swing. On the outskirts of town, Clive encounters a congregation practising a hidden religious faith, while in the historic old town, he meets artisans who are reviving intricate, traditional craftwork. Then, he heads to the market with one of the country’s top chefs to pick up the ingredients for a seven-meat Dominican dish.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: The Climate Question
programme.desc: A global programme that reflects the variety of takes on climate change, how best to understand it and the world's attempts to avert it, temper it or adapt to it. It is not about questioning whether climate change is happening, it's about finding the best ways to respond to it. This is sharp-edged, analytical inquiry. Hard scrutiny, touched with a sense of adventure and discovery, and where we can find it, hope. It includes stories from across the world on why we find it so hard to save our own planet, and how we might change that.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: The Media Show
programme.desc: An AI-generated actor called Tilly Norwood has been cast in the lead role of a forthcoming film, adding to the debate about artificial intelligence in filmmaking. The announcement follows criticism from actors such as Emily Blunt, and objections from the US performers' union. Eline Van der Velden, founder and CEO of Particle6, explains why she created Tilly Norwood, while Jake Kanter, international investigations editor at Deadline, sets out the reaction from the film industry. Andy Burnham has become the UK's new prime minister, and his approach to the media is already attracting attention. His team has relied more on social media, online creators and direct communication than on traditional broadcast interviews. Lizzy Buchan, political editor of the Daily Mirror; Jennifer Gerber, senior political advisor, WA Communications; Tom Nicholas, creator of the Slow News Day YouTube channel; and broadcaster Andrew Neil, presenter of The Andrew Neil Report, assess what this could mean for political journalism and public accountability.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: The Travel Show
programme.desc: It's an important year for the city of Hull, in northern England. It's celebrating more than 800 years of maritime history with a raft of new museum openings that it's hoped will make it a world-class visitor attraction. Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to see the opening of the restored Spurn Lightship - literally a lighthouse on a ship - which was a mainstay on the waterways there for 50 years. She meets the people involved in the huge regeneration effort and finds out why the city's been the punchline of jokes for so many years.

programme.title: Talking Business
programme.desc: Just how long can Iran afford to keep fighting the US? War is expensive, and Iran’s economy is facing recession as people struggle with soaring prices, rising unemployment and a weak currency. But with the fighting continuing, are years of international financial sanctions really having the desired impact? Professor Djavad Salehi-Isfahani, a leading expert on Iran’s economy, tells us what he found on a recent visit to Tehran, and Mark Wallace, CEO of campaign group United Against a Nuclear Iran, explains the realities of sanctions. Plus, Ben Thompson also hears from Tom Broughton, founder of London glasses brand Cubitts, about how he’s taking on the big names in a multi-billion dollar industry.

programme.title: AI Decoded
programme.desc: AI Decoded explores the growing backlash against artificial intelligence. As fears of job losses spread through the tech industry and protests against AI data centres gather momentum, we ask whether the promises of an AI-powered future are starting to unravel. Plus, could advanced AI one day become conscious, and if it does, what responsibilities would we have towards it? Presenter Marc Cieslak is joined by digital rights activist Cory Doctorow, AI entrepreneur Priya Lakhani and academic Dr Ella Hafermalz to unpack the biggest questions facing AI today.

programme.title: China's Greatest Treasures
programme.desc: The Yellow River - running for almost five and half thousand kilometres from west to east - is known as China's mother river. It's hailed as the cradle of Chinese civilisation and over thousands of years, it has fed billions of people and inspired generations of artists. Alastair explores the Yellow River and discovers some of the finest artwork from its valley, to understand how this unique natural phenomenon is deeply connected with the identity of the Chinese and the roots of their culture.

programme.title: Global Eye
programme.desc: A weekly programme from the BBC World Service, bringing forensic journalism from all corners of the world by BBC Eye, the World Service's critically acclaimed investigative unit, and featuring expert global correspondents getting to the heart of the biggest international stories. This week, in the aftermath of a political earthquake in Hungary, Stephanie Hegarty explores whether the downfall of Viktor Orbán could be a warning sign for populist leaders everywhere, and BBC Eye investigates the Russian nationalists who are taking the law into their own hands.

This week, in the aftermath of a political earthquake in Hungary, Stephanie Hegarty explores whether the downfall of Viktor Orbán could be a warning sign for populist leaders everywhere, and BBC Eye investigates the Russian nationalists who are taking the law into their own hands.

programme.title: Cinta Ditolak Disko Bertindak
programme.desc: Inilah lika-liku persahabatan Mila dan Zani, dua gadis yang berlawanan pandangan soal ramalan. Tidak hanya kekonyolan, kisah ini juga menghadirkan perjuangan keduanya meraih asmara.

programme.title: Salon Madam : Rambut Api
programme.desc: Seorang wanita datang ke Salon Madam untuk mengecat rambutnya dan mempercantik penampilannya, tapi cantik itu luka, dan rambutnya bisa menjadi petaka membara jika tak digunakan dengan bijak.

programme.title: Ketukan Yang Mengancam
programme.desc: Aris, Novi dan Danu adalah sahabat dekat sejak SMP. Setelah tanpa sengaja menguping pembicaraan tentang meja kayu tua misterius di gudang sekolah yang bisa memanggil arwah, mereka berniat membuktikannya.

programme.title: Pangeran Kodok
programme.desc: Joshua meminta nasihat pada Ki Abra yang memberinya mantra, namun mantra tersebut hanya bisa dipakai sekali dan tidak boleh salah ucap. Saat mencoba mantranya, Joshua melakukan kesalahan besar terjadi.

programme.title: Cincin Wali
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda dari kota datang ke sebuah desa dan melihat gadis yang pernah ditemuinya dalam mimpi. Dia tinggal di pesantren yang sama dengan gadis tersebut. Namun, untuk mendapatkan gadis itu dia harus memperoleh cincin wali.

programme.title: Mencari Pangeran Sepatu Basket
programme.desc: Miranda trauma dengan pria, hubungannya selalu gagal dan dia selalu dikecewakan. Untuk mengobati hati, Miranda pergi liburan dengan kapal pesiar. Tak di sangka di kapal pesiar itu Miranda justru berkenalan dengan Ibas.

programme.title: Prajurit Bantegan
programme.desc: Igo pindah dari kota besar setelah kedua orang tuanya meninggal. Saat mendapat masalah dengan pemilik sanggar bantengan, dia bertemu Ki Sungkur yang menolongnya. Sejak itu dia berguru silat kepada Ki Sungkur.

programme.title: Bidadari Di Kebun Strawberry
programme.desc: Misi yang dijalankan seharusnya mudah, yaitu menaikkan penjualan strawberry, tapi ada saja yang menghalangi usahanya termasuk pria tampan yang tiba-tiba muncul.

programme.title: Cinta Dalam Dompet
programme.desc: Tak ingin diledek jomblo terus, Kinan berpura-pura menjadi pacar Reno yang tajir, namun Reno hanya memanfaatkan Kinan saja. Ternyata Reno tidak setajir yang Kinan kira.

programme.title: Ku Jahit Cinta Dengan Bismillah
programme.desc: Lila anak yatim yang bekerja sebagai penjahit. Saat sedang mengantarkan hasil jahitan, dia menabrak motor Robby. Sebagai ganti rugi, Lila harus berpura-pura menjadi pacarnya. Seiring waktu berjalan, tumbuh rasa cinta.

programme.title: Pliss Gue Bukan Princess
programme.desc: Genta mengenalkan Alila, pacarnya, ke ibunya. Namun, Alila dianggap kurang feminin, sehingga ibu Genta memberi waktu agar Alila bisa berubah.

programme.title: Petaka Topi Pemikat
programme.desc: Annisa kehilangan nenek yang merawatnya sejak kecil, ia difitnah para tetangga yang menuduhnya menjual rujak beracun. Kehidupan Annisa berubah saat mendapat topi pancar pesona dari toko KR. Amat. Setelah itu keanehan pun terjadi.

programme.title: Janda Janda Jagoan
programme.desc: Maya, Anggi, dan Sindy adalah tiga perempuan jagoan yang berstatus janda. Mereka menjadi incaran penjahat. Vina, anak Anggi diculik oleh penjahat itu. Dapatkah tiga jagoan ini membebaskan Vina?

programme.title: Telur Asin Cap Cinta
programme.desc: Tanpa sengaja Dhira merusak ponsel Cindy, dia pun bingung karena dia juga punya utang kepada orang lain. Akhirnya dia memutuskan berjualan telur asin.

programme.title: Toko Kr.Amat Sepeda Onthel Badai
programme.desc: Guntur berencana membeli sepeda ontel di toko Kr.Amat yang katanya bisa melaju secepat cahaya hanya dengan sekali kayuh. Terbukti ketika Guntur mengayuh pedal tiba-tiba sepeda itu melesat sangat kencang lalu lenyap dalam sekejap.

programme.title: The Power Of Emak-Emak
programme.desc: Ibu Elis mengkhawatirkan Ira, anaknya yang pacaran dengan Andra. Ira tidak menyadari Andra itu playboy. Ibu Elis tidak setuju Ira melanjutkan hubungannya dengan Andra karena Andra sudah dua kali menabrak Ibu Elis.

programme.title: Pacar Dari Langit
programme.desc: Karena ayahnya sakit. Mega terpaksa pulang ke kampung halaman dan jatuh cinta kepada alien bernama Zen. yang berjanji akan selalu menjaganya.

programme.title: Saat Teduh Bersama Gereja Mawar Sharon
The Pearl Phoenix
programme.desc: Dalam tradisi Opera Huangmei, film ini menceritakan kisah cinta Wen, yang menjual dirinya sebagai budak ke sebuah keluarga kaya, dan Huo, seorang putri muda dari keluarga itu.

programme.title: The Boxer From The Temple
programme.desc: Di kota, ia berhadapan dengan putra seorang bandit kejam dan seorang PSK yang disiksa. Sejak itu, pertarungan demi pertarungan terjadi saat kekuatan 'Crazy Lo Han Fist' yang dikuasainya menghancurkan geng-geng jahat.

programme.title: Pale Passion
programme.desc: Dalam Pale Passion, disutradarai oleh Chin Ping-hsing, Chiang Li-ping berperan sebagai Ah Hsia dalam kisah perselingkuhan, perzinahan dan pengkhianatan yang menyebabkan cinta segitiga berdarah.

programme.title: Five Shaolin Masters
programme.desc: Setelah Kuil Shaolin dihancurkan, lima orang siswa belajar teknik-teknik Shaolin untuk mengalahkan musuh-musuh mereka yang dipimpin oleh Ching. Namun, ada seorang 'pengkhianat' di antara mereka. Siapakah ia?

programme.title: The Crazy Bumpkins
programme.desc: Komedi yang menggelikan ini menampilkan seorang pria lugu bernama Ah Niu. Dia pergi ke Hong Kong dan terus-menerus dieksploitasi dan dimanfaatkan, bahkan ditangkap dan dipenjara.

programme.title: The Web Of Death
programme.desc: Demi menguasai dunia seni bela diri, Kepala Sekte Ular berusaha mendapatkan 'Five Poison Web' nan mematikan, dan menyebarkan desas-desus tentang keberadaannya. Xiong dan Kit pun ditugaskan untuk menyelidikinya.

programme.title: The Tiger And The Widow
programme.desc: Hui Ying-hung terlibat dalam sebuah jaringan penyelundupan orang-orang hilang dan berada dalam situasi yang membahayakan.

programme.title: The Iron Buddha
programme.desc: Setelah seorang pemerkosa keji membunuh sang guru dan seluruh klannya, Si Buddha Besi bertekad untuk membalas dendam. Namun tentu saja, ia membutuhkan sebuah pedang sakti.

programme.title: The Adv. Of Emperor Chien Lung
programme.desc: Liu Yung berperan sebagai detektif di masa Dinasti Ching yang menyelidiki kasus korupsi di pengadilan dengan bantuan seorang pemuda cerdik. Mereka memberikan pelajaran berharga pada orang-orang korup ini.

programme.title: The Tea House
programme.desc: Dalam drama kejahatan yang disutradarai oleh Kuei Chih Hung ini, legenda seni bela diri Chan Koon Tai berperan sebagai seorang pemimpin geng yang menjalankan aksinya di sebuah kafe lokal.

programme.title: The Lark
programme.desc: Bintang pop di tahun '60-an, Carrie Ku Mei, berperan sebagai 'Burung Kecil' dalam film romantis tentang salah identitas ini yang menampilkan beberapa lagu Mandarin paling populer sepanjang masa.

programme.title: The 36th Chamber Of Shaolin
programme.desc: Dalam film peraih penghargaan di tahun 1978 ini, Liu Yu-Te kabur ke Kuil Shaolin dan menguasai 35 jurus Kung Fu Shaolin. Setelah berhasil membalaskan dendamnya, ia berlatih Jurus ke-36.

programme.title: The Rebel Intruders
programme.desc: Ribuan pengungsi bergegas ke kota-kota di selatan guna menghindari perang saudara di utara. Tiga pemuda dengan kemampuan seni bela diri tak sengaja terlibat dalam pertempuran para pemimpin pemberontak di kota.

programme.title: The Brave Archer
programme.desc: Guo Jing bertemu Huang Rong dan mereka jatuh cinta. Di saat yang sama, Ouyang Ke melamar Huang Rong, sehingga ayah Huang mengatur sebuah duel untuk kedua pria tersebut.

programme.title: The Brave Archer
programme.desc: Guo Jing bertemu Huang Rong dan mereka jatuh cinta. Di saat yang sama, Ouyang Ke melamar Huang Rong, sehingga ayah Huang mengatur sebuah duel untuk kedua pria tersebut.

programme.title: The Kingdom And The Beauty
programme.desc: Aktris muda Linda Lin Dai tampil memukau sebagai seorang gadis desa yang menjalin hubungan gelap dengan Kaisar Cheng-Te, pria yang ia cintai seumur hidupnya.

programme.title: The Flying Guillotine
programme.desc: Ma Teng adalah salah satu dari 'Flying Guillotine Squad', sekelompok pembunuh yang ditugaskan oleh Kaisar Yung. Saat ia mulai mempertanyakan moralitas misinya, ia menjadi buronan yang diburu oleh mantan rekan-rekannya.

programme.title: The Dancing Millionairess
programme.desc: Chen Hou adalah seorang sopir yang terjebak dalam skandal salah identitas yang membawanya pada pebisnis wanita Lok Dai. Saat rumor menyebar bahwa mereka berpacaran, Lok Dai pun marah dan meminta penjelasannya.

programme.title: The Silent Swordsman
programme.desc: Seorang pendekar pedang muda ditugaskan memimpin perkumpulan rahasia patriotik demi melawan jenderal pengkhianat yang berkolusi dengan musuh. Lalu, ia bertemu dengan seorang prajurit wanita dan dua putri cantik.

programme.title: The Warlord
programme.desc: Dua pemuda bergabung dengan kelompok pemberontak setelah Revolusi Tiongkok tahun 1911 dan tak sengaja menjadi pahlawan. Dibantu oleh seorang putri panglima perang, mereka berhasil membantu pemberontak mencuri senjata.

programme.title: Tales Of A Eunuch
programme.desc: Film ini berkisah tentang perjuangan seorang berandal terkenal, yang gemar berjudi dan terlibat masalah dengan para penjahat dan pemberontak, dalam mencari sebuah naskah khusus Buddha.

programme.title: The Lotus Lamp
programme.desc: Dalam film fantasi nan menawan ini, Lin Dai berperan sebagai seorang dewi yang jatuh cinta pada seorang pria terpelajar. 14 tahun kemudian, putra mereka berusaha menguak misteri tentang jati dirinya.

programme.title: Challenge Of The Gamesters
programme.desc: Wong Jing menciptakan genre film perjudian hampir sendirian, dan dalam salah satu film laris awalnya, Shih Hsien memimpin pemeran bintang dalam kisah tentang mata-mata, taipan, dan gadis cantik.

programme.title: The Grand Substitution
programme.desc: Opera Huangmei yang epik ini dibintangi oleh Li Li-hua dan Ivy Ling Po dalam kisah tentang seorang pelayan Istana yang menyerahkan putranya yang baru lahir, demi menyelamatkan sang pangeran dari seorang pejabat jahat.

programme.title: Heroes Shed No Tears
programme.desc: Alexander Fu Sheng berperan sebagai seorang pria yang konon hanya bisa dibunuh oleh sebuah pedang yang ditempa dengan tetesan air mata.

programme.title: The Bride Napping
programme.desc: Yue Ying si gadis kaya dan pelayannya Chun Lan, bertemu seorang siswa miskin Bian Ji di sebuah pesta. Chun Lan menyadari Ying jatuh cinta pada Ji, tapi karena kesalahan pelayan tua, ia mengira bahwa Ji adalah bandit.

programme.title: The Heroic Ones
programme.desc: David Chiang berperan sebagai Pangeran ke-13, seorang petarung muda yang perkasa. Status istimewa yang ia miliki menimbulkan kecemburuan dan perseteruan keluarga yang mengerikan.

programme.title: The Heroic Ones
programme.desc: David Chiang berperan sebagai Pangeran ke-13, seorang petarung muda yang perkasa. Status istimewa yang ia miliki menimbulkan kecemburuan dan perseteruan keluarga yang mengerikan.

programme.title: Lovers Blades
programme.desc: Film komedi ini bercerita tentang cinta terlarang dan senjata ajaib. Sepasang kekasih harus memperoleh kembali pedang titular dan membalas dendam atas pembunuhan yang terjadi di masa lalu mereka!

programme.title: Vengeance Of A Snow Girl
programme.desc: Kisah luar biasa tentang seorang pendekar wanita kejam yang bertekad untuk menangkap pembunuh orangtuanya.

programme.title: The House Of 72 Tenants
programme.desc: 72 penghuni rumah petak nan kumuh hidup di bawah pengawasan pemilik rumah yang tak berperasaan dan suami jahatnya. Namun, kedatangan seorang penyewa baru nan berani, mengubah nasib mereka.

programme.title: Shaolin Hand Lock
programme.desc: Cheng-ying dan saudarinya memasuki kehidupan Lin Hao nan kejam demi menjalankan rencana untuk membalas kematian ayah mereka dengan memanfaatkan Jurus Tangan Pengunci Shaolin yang mematikan.

programme.title: Fangs Of The Cobra
programme.desc: Film thriller nan unik ini sama sekali tidak seseram judulnya, berkisah tentang seekor ular gagah berani dan berbudi luhur yang merusak perangkap, melawan tikus pemakan bayi, dan bahkan mengalahkan sejumlah geng saingan.

programme.title: The Silver Fox
programme.desc: Lily Ho berperan sebagai pendekar pedang wanita yang ditakuti. Ia pernah menyaksikan ayahnya disiksa dan ibunya diperkosa. 18 tahun berlalu sejak peristiwa itu, ia berencana untuk membalas dendam.

programme.title: Emperor Chien Lung
programme.desc: Kaisar Chien Lung melakukan penyamaran untuk berbaur dengan rakyatnya dan memahami kebutuhan mereka. Ia mengalami hal aneh di sepanjang jalan, termasuk ditangkap dan hampir dipenggal. Siapa yang akan menyelamatkannya?

programme.title: Chinatown Kid
programme.desc: Alexander Fu Sheng kabur ke San Francisco setelah dijebak atas kepemilikan narkoba. Ia membantu geng Naga Putih nan terkenal, yang dipimpin oleh Philip Kwok, dalam perang antargeng yang mengerikan, tapi ia dikhianati.

programme.title: The Last Tempest
programme.desc: Sekuel dari The Empress Dowager ini melanjutkan kisah Kaisar Guangxu dan Ibu Suri Cixi. Terlepas dari penobatan Guangxu sebagai raja, kemampuannya untuk memerintah secara efektif dibayangi oleh kekuatan Cixi.

programme.title: The Winged Tiger
programme.desc: Dunia seni bela diri akan kacau jika dua penjahat besar, Winged Tiger dan Underworld King bergabung. Hal ini akan terjadi dengan pernikahan antara saudara perempuan dari Underworld King dan Winged Tiger.

programme.title: Torrent Of Desire
programme.desc: David jatuh cinta pada Dan Feng dan menikahinya. Saudari David yang bernama Mona jatuh cinta dengan sahabatnya, Han Ming. Karena cemburu, Mona berbohong tentang perselingkuhan antara Han Ming dan Dan Feng.

programme.title: Hex After Hex
programme.desc: Kueh Chih Hung, sang sutradara pujaan, menampilkan kisah tragedi romantis tentang arwah Lo Meng yang berupaya merasuk ke dalam tubuh cinta sejatinya, namun upayanya justru menjadi bumerang.

programme.title: The Kung-Fu Instructor
programme.desc: Wong Yang adalah seorang seniman bela diri terkenal yang dipaksa untuk mengajarkan kung fu ke Klan Mong, sebuah klan jahat yang mencoba menghancurkan musuh bebuyutannya, Klan Chow.

programme.title: Mr. Vampire 2
programme.desc: Perampok kuburan menemukan vampir yang diawetkan. Saat mengangkut vampir anak, mantra yang mengikatnya hilang, dan ia berteman dengan penduduk setempat. Vampir orang tua terbangun dan melarikan diri. Tabib herbal mengejar untuk menghancurkan mereka.

programme.title: The Bullet Vanishes
programme.desc: Son Donglu, seorang detektif yang baru dipromosikan, bekerja sama dengan Guo Zhui, penembak tercepat di Tiancheng, dan Xiaowu, seorang polisi pemula, untuk menyelidiki kematian misterius di sebuah pabrik peluru.

programme.title: Blind War
programme.desc: Mantan kapten SWAT, Dong Gu, menderita kehilangan penglihatan traumatis kala gagal menjalankan misi. Namun, musuh bebuyutannya muncul dan membuat putrinya dalam bahaya. Ia pun harus berjuang menyelamatkan putrinya.

programme.title: Endless Love
programme.desc: Seorang gadis muda bertemu dengan seorang novelis di sebuah bar dan langsung jatuh cinta padanya. Namun, ternyata ia malah terperangkap ke dalam jebakan yang direkayasa oleh si novelis dan mantan kekasihnya.

programme.title: Munitions Hijacking Case
programme.desc: Agen Wen ditugaskan untuk menyamar sebagai pedagang senjata militer di Asia Tenggara guna menemukan beberapa amunisi dan menghancurkannya. Namun, ia diserang oleh gangster tak dikenal saat menemukan amunisi tersebut.

programme.title: Iceman: The Time Traveler
programme.desc: Pengawal kekaisaran dan ketiga teman masa kecilnya yang berkhianat, yang diperintahkan untuk memburunya, secara tidak sengaja terkubur dan membeku dalam waktu. 400 tahun kemudian berlalu dan mereka dicairkan, melanjutkan pertempuran yang mereka tinggalkan.

programme.title: Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon
programme.desc: Seorang prajurit muda Tiongkok mencuri pedang dari seorang pendekar pedang terkenal dan kemudian melarikan diri ke dunia petualangan romantis bersama seorang pria misterius di perbatasan negara.

programme.title: Prince Charming
programme.desc: Chen Li Pin, putra dari pengusaha yang culun, mendapat kekecewaan usai mencari jodoh di Hawaii bersama temannya. Kemudian, secara tak sengaja mereka terjebak dalam sebuah pertukaran identitas yang kacau.

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Saat seorang pria meninggalkan istri dan putrinya, serangkaian percakapan singkat, gerakan yang diamati, pertemuan tak sengaja, dan tindakan impulsif, menceritakan kisah hubungan yang gagal dan berkembang setelah keputusan ini.

programme.title: Get In The Dark
programme.desc: Nona Qiao meninggal secara tak wajar dan kepala pelayannya membayar seorang perajin untuk membuat sebuah boneka kertas. Serangkaian peristiwa nan mengerikan terjadi saat arwah Nona Qiao bangkit untuk membalas dendam.

programme.title: The Grandmaster
programme.desc: Ip Man menerima sebuah tantangan bertarung dari master asal utara yang sudah tua bernama Gong Yu Tian dan berhasil memenangkannya. Namun, ia dikalahkan oleh putri sang master, Gong Er, dan jatuh cinta padanya.

programme.title: The Grandmaster
programme.desc: Ip Man menerima sebuah tantangan bertarung dari master asal utara yang sudah tua bernama Gong Yu Tian dan berhasil memenangkannya. Namun, ia dikalahkan oleh putri sang master, Gong Er, dan jatuh cinta padanya.

programme.title: Mr. Vampire 3
programme.desc: Seorang pendeta Tao dan para pendamping rohnya harus berpisah setelah ia memutuskan untuk membantu seorang pemburu vampir, yang ingin mengalahkan seorang penyihir jahat dan para pengikutnya.

programme.title: Challenge Of The Gamesters
programme.desc: Wong Jing menciptakan genre film perjudian hampir sendirian, dan dalam salah satu film laris awalnya, Shih Hsien memimpin pemeran bintang dalam kisah tentang mata-mata, taipan, dan gadis cantik.

programme.title: Mr. Virgin
programme.desc: Ketika seorang pemuda mengabaikan peringatan seorang ahli feng shui dan memutuskan untuk menikah sebelum berusia 30 tahun, serangkaian kesialan mulai mengutuk hidupnya.

programme.title: Destiny's Champion
programme.desc: Sun Chung dan Ti Lung bersatu kembali untuk sebuah kisah menegangkan tentang seorang pendekar tua yang berusaha menebus kesalahannya di masa lalu melalui seorang anak jalanan yang bijaksana.

programme.title: Chinese Odyssey: Pandora's Box
programme.desc: Raja Kera bereinkarnasi dalam wujud bukan manusia sebagai Joker, seorang perampok jalanan yang tidak menyadari identitas aslinya dan fakta bahwa 500 tahun sebelumnya, dia dan tuannya, Biksu Panjang Umur, dihukum dan dipaksa untuk tetap menjadi manusia.

programme.title: Out Of The Dark
programme.desc: Seorang wanita tua tewas setelah terjatuh dari sebuah gedung dan arwahnya menghantui tempat tersebut. Merasa ketakutan, para penjaga keamanan setempat pun meminta bantuan Leo si pemburu hantu beserta asistennya.

programme.title: Forbidden City Cop
programme.desc: Seorang agen kekaisaran diejek karena berbagai penemuannya, hingga istrinya yang suportif mendorongnya untuk menghadiri sebuah konferensi, yang sebenarnya adalah jebakan untuk membunuh semua dokter yang melayani kaisar, di mana penemuan-penemuan gilanya menjadi berguna.

programme.title: Young Heroes Of Chaotic Times
programme.desc: Kisah ini berlatar di Shanghai pada akhir masa Dinasti Qing, dan bercerita tentang seorang pemuda bernama Chen Zhen yang menjadi seorang pahlawan nasional usai menanggung kesulitan dan mengatasi tantangan dalam hidup.

programme.title: Mr. Vampire Saga 4
programme.desc: Seorang Pendeta Taois tidak senang ketika rekan Pendeta Buddha-nya pindah ke sebelah rumahnya. Mereka sering terlibat perselisihan dan duel, tetapi segera harus mengatasi masalah mereka ketika seorang vampir keluar dari peti matinya dan mendatangkan malapetaka di pedesaan.

programme.title: Mr. Vampire Saga 4
programme.desc: Seorang Pendeta Taois tidak senang ketika rekan Pendeta Buddha-nya pindah ke sebelah rumahnya. Mereka sering terlibat perselisihan dan duel, tetapi segera harus mengatasi masalah mereka ketika seorang vampir keluar dari peti matinya dan mendatangkan malapetaka di pedesaan.

programme.title: Face To Face
programme.desc: Tamotsu tewas dalam sebuah kecelakaan ski. Kemudian, teman sekamarnya, Yoshio, menikahi istrinya serta mewarisi seluruh kekayaannya. Namun, segalanya berubah sejak Yoshio bertemu seorang pria tua di pemakaman Tamotsu.

programme.title: Dragon Master: Dragon Spell
programme.desc: Raja Naga dikunci dalam segel oleh Tuan Naga selama 500 tahun, dan putri sang Raja harus kembali ke masa lalu guna membunuh Tuan Naga saat mengetahui bahwa keduanya adalah teman dekat di masa lalu.

programme.title: Let's Have A Baby
programme.desc: Sebuah kisah menarik tentang kerumitan dalam menciptakan anak, yang menampilkan penampilan komedi langka oleh Alex Man Chi Leung.

programme.title: Ip Man 2
programme.desc: Berfokus pada migrasi Ip Man ke Hong Kong pada tahun 1949 saat ia berupaya menyebarkan disiplin ilmu bela diri Wing Chun yang dianutnya.

programme.title: Painted Faces
programme.desc: Sebelum memenangkan pujian dalam film laga berkat aksi-aksi mereka yang berani, para bintang ini menjalani tahun-tahun penuh darah, keringat, dan air mata saat berlatih di bawah bimbingan Master Yu yang kejam.

programme.title: The Bare-Footed Kid
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda tiba di kota untuk bekerja dengan teman mendiang sang ayah. Ketika toko pewarna mereka dibakar oleh seorang pemimpin geng setempat, ia memutuskan untuk melawan demi melindungi dan menyelamatkan toko.

programme.title: Confession Of Pain
programme.desc: Seorang detektif membantu temannya menyelidiki kematian misterius ayah mertuanya.

programme.title: From Beijing With Love
programme.desc: Seorang mata-mata Tiongkok yang telah pensiun selama sepuluh tahun dan mencari nafkah sebagai tukang daging dikirim ke Hong Kong untuk menemukan tengkorak Tyrannosaurus rex yang dicuri.

programme.title: Behind The Yellow Line
programme.desc: Seorang pria muda yang pemalu dan pekerja kantoran, bertemu dengan seorang wanita cantik dan ambisius yang sedang mengejar karirnya, serta seorang pria lain yang ramah namun penuh rahasia. Pertemuan ini membawa mereka ke dalam perjalanan emosional yang kompleks, penuh dengan kebingungan, kesalahpahaman, dan penemuan diri.

programme.title: Fight Back To School 2
programme.desc: Sing mengundurkan diri dari kepolisian setelah diturunkan pangkatnya ke bagian pengaturan lalu lintas, sementara rekannya ditugaskan dalam misi yang melibatkan teroris asing yang mengancam akan mengebom sebuah sekolah di Hong Kong, sehingga Sing memutuskan untuk membantu dengan menyamar di sekolah yang sama.

programme.title: The Last Tycoon
programme.desc: Bintang laga Chow Yun-Fat memerankan gangster sungguhan Chen Daqi saat ia naik ke eselon atas kekuasaan, mendapati dirinya terpecah antara cinta dua wanita, rencana pembunuhan dinas rahasia, dan ancaman perang yang membayangi.

programme.title: The Stormriders
programme.desc: Seorang panglima perang jahat menerima 2 murid (Angin & Awan) dalam upaya untuk menjadi tak terkalahkan agar dia dapat menguasai dunia.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Olde Hitching Post: Gordon visits the historic Olde Hitching Post restaurant in Massachusetts. Tom bought the business for his daughter but refuses to let her run it. (S6 Ep6) [S,SL]

programme.title: The Undeclared War
programme.desc: The cyber thriller returns with Simon Pegg and Siân Brooke. At GCHQ, Danny's under pressure dealing with the fallout from the Russian cyber-attack when a bold new threat emerges. (S2 Ep1/6) [AD,S,SL]

programme.title: The Undeclared War
programme.desc: Cyber thriller with Simon Pegg and Siân Brooke. Vadim finds himself working in captivity for the Chinese. At GCHQ, Danny and Roz clash over China, and the mole hunt continues... (S2 Ep2/6) [AD,S,SL]

programme.title: Britain's Most Expensive Houses
programme.desc: Diana vies for the listing of a £30m mega home in Mayfair. And can Tessa and Amy help Christine to close a deal on a townhouse and a modern country home? (S2 Ep5) [AD,S,SL]

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: High-flyers Bob and Louise, youngsters Will and Kim, and Iranian expats Pasha and Haleh compete in Cheltenham, in a week featuring huge portions, a tale of heroism and Persian rice pudding. [S,SL]

programme.title: Sunday Brunch

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Loathe and Marriage: Carla's daughter Serafina announces that she has to get married because she's expecting a baby, and wants her dad to walk her down the aisle. (S11 Ep15/28) [S]

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne's Room: When Frasier innocently searches for his missing book in Daphne's room, he inadvertently digs himself into a big financial hole. (S2 Ep17) [AD,S]

programme.desc: Channel 4's midday news summary. [S]

programme.title: Car S.O.S
programme.desc: Lexus IS200: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend delve into unknown territory when they transform Charlie's beloved Lexus IS200 into a full-blown competition drift car. (S12 Ep9) [AD,S]

programme.title: The Great House Giveaway

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Justin Moorhouse in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Erica and Ian dream of owning a holiday home on their favourite Canary Island of Fuerteventura, where they can escape from cold winters. Lee Juggurnauth shows them what £170k can buy. [S]

programme.desc: In Cheshire, Kim rehearses for the local panto onboard his boat, and in Northamptonshire, the Water Chaplains bring Easter cheer to all at the Buckby Locks. (S2 Ep20) [AD,S]

programme.desc: Clips and anecdotes about the best television moments from the famously swinging decade, including the moon landing, the launch of Top Of The Pops, and Valerie Singleton taking a lion for a walk.

programme.title: 5 News Weekend
programme.desc: National and international news.

programme.title: Tour de France 2026
programme.desc: Rebecca Charlton presents highlights from Stage 20. The final mountain stage of the 2026 Tour sees the peloton travel from Le Bourg-d'Oisans to Alpe d'Huez. For riders still hoping to improve their position in the general classification, this represents one last opportunity before the race concludes in Paris. Featuring the day's decisive moments, expert analysis and reaction as the overall contenders make their last push for glory.

programme.title: Sussex: Jewel of the South Coast
programme.desc: We celebrate one of the UK's greenest counties as we witness the release of wildlife back to the Sussex shoreline, and see the inaugural locomotive launch of the Bluebell Railway.

programme.title: Prince George at 13: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Could Prince George's progressive upbringing shape his reign and change the monarchy forever? In this fascinating documentary, we delve into the making of a future king.

programme.title: Commonwealth Games 2026
programme.desc: Highlights from day two of the 2026 Commonwealth Games in Glasgow, including the Artistic Gymnastics Women's Team Final and medal events in Swimming and Para Swimming.

programme.title: The 70s: Everything We Loved & Lost
programme.desc: Take a trip back in time as we recall precious products from the 70s that meant so much to us, from Jackie magazine to Viewmaster, Angel Delight to cheese and pineapple on a cocktail stick!

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
programme.desc: Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!

programme.title: Murder Scene: The Incident Room
programme.desc: In December 2013, 17-year-old Jayden Parkinson went missing. Detectives suspect she been murdered, and have many questions for her ex-boyfriend. Has Jayden been killed and, if so, where is her body?

programme.title: Jersey and Guernsey
programme.desc: On Liberation Day across the islands, celebrations are under way to mark the anniversary of freedom from Nazi occupation. On Guernsey, Robert leads a military vehicle cavalcade.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel resigns herself to telling her father she is pregnant with Ross's baby, prompting her father to confront Ross just as he is getting close with Mona. (S8 Ep8)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica invites her old school friend Will - who also used to be fat - to Thanksgiving dinner. However, Monica is unaware that he is not fond of Rachel. (S8 Ep9)

programme.title: Milo (Visually Signed)
programme.desc: Chef Pierre invites the intrepid trio to the high seas to catch fish for his restaurant. Milo and his pals wonder if they will land anything for the menu. (BSL)

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington (Visually Signed)
programme.desc: Drainpipe Dan is on the loose stealing Mrs Brown's wedding ring. Inspector Paddington is on his trail. (VS) (S1 Ep22)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa wants to help Mummy Pig when she learns of the busy work that she is doing on her computer, but Peppa and George inadvertently break Mummy's computer.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy suggests a game that the family can play so that George can learn how to catch the ball; Peppa begins to feel left out as the smallest pig.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When Daddy Pig loses his glasses he gets a bit grumpy. But Peppa and George have lots of fun looking for them.

programme.title: Milo
programme.desc: Milo, Lofty and Lark take over as royal guards to transport and protect Queen Mabel's Crown Jewels. When crafty Mr Croc plans to steal the jewels, Milo, Lofty and Lark must stand guard!

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: All Engines Go!
programme.desc: Carly has gone missing somewhere on Sodor and it's up to Sandy and Diesel to use their detective skills to find her.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Professor Pickles is interested in seeing how his ancestors did things, until his boat sinks and he needs a rescue using modern day methods and technology!

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: The Browns are fed up with Bessie the campervan breaking down, so Paddington sells her but soon regrets being so helpful.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim, Tia and Tommy decide to put on a talent show, but they immediately stumble when they can't decide who should go first.

programme.title: Pip and Posy
programme.desc: Pip and Posy are playing a fun game where they can't touch the ground for fear that crocodiles will chomp them in Croc Attack. However, Pip starts to become obsessed with playing.

programme.title: Pip and Posy
programme.desc: Pip can't concentrate on the Toy Quest treasure hunt that Posy has made for him because he is waiting for Jamila to arrive with a dinosaur book. Posy thinks of a way to help him.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: With a new baby on the way, Mummy and Daddy Pig realise they have run out of space at home! They decide to make their own home bigger with an extension.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mr Bull arrives with his team to start work on Peppa's house renovation. Peppa and family move into the caravan in the garden while the work is being completed. It's a bit of a squeeze!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Winnie Winnington goes looking for a frog to enter in a frog-jumping contest and ends up needing to be rescued from a swamp

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: The pups must help salmon get to the ocean and also need to rescue Alex who gets stuck on top of a dam.

programme.title: Animal Care Club
programme.desc: The cadets need to give the animals best care at Scarborough Sea Life Centre, with activities including breakfast for the seals and cleaning the enclosure for the Humboldt Penguins.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Handy puts together an A-team to get his jet pack back from Gargamel's hovel. (S3 Ep16)

programme.title: The Creature Cases
programme.desc: A bird neighbourhood is rattled by a mysterious invader, who is pushing eggs out of nests, and replacing them with her own!

programme.desc: A classic villain returns to his former lair, only to find the Star Family inhabiting it.

programme.desc: Feature-length animated adventure. After a diabolical pirate steals the secret Krabby Patty formula, SpongeBob and his friends must team up to retrieve it.

programme.title: Commonwealth Games 2026
programme.desc: Highlights from day two of the 2026 Commonwealth Games in Glasgow, including the Artistic Gymnastics Women's Team Final and medal events in Swimming and Para Swimming.

programme.title: Happy Campers: The Caravan Park
programme.desc: Campers in Cornwall contend with high winds and lashing rain, and CCTV reveals ghostly goings on in a clubhouse that have resulted in the loss of alcohol.

programme.title: Cruising with Susan Calman
programme.desc: Susan travels through the Douro valley, starting in Porto, where she takes the city's cable car and visits Europe's biggest lock. She also visits Salamanca, and enjoying a flamenco show.

programme.title: Cruising with Susan Calman
programme.desc: A vineyard, a riverside train ride, an amazing francesinha sandwich and singers called Tunas are some of the highlights of Susan's cruise through Portugal's stunning Douro valley.

programme.title: Into Death Valley with Nick Knowles
programme.desc: In the hottest place on Earth, Nick goes sand buggy driving, and experiences dawn at Zabriskie Point with amazing views of craggy mountains, dunes and salt flats.

programme.title: Into Death Valley with Nick Knowles
programme.desc: The presenter travels from golden dunes at the southern tip of Death Valley, through barren salt flats to a well-preserved ghost town, before ending up at Death Valley Junction.

programme.title: Lisbon with Michael Portillo
programme.desc: In the captivating Portuguese capital, Michael embraces the sea-faring spirit of the great navigators, savours quirky and fiery cuisine and loses himself in melancholic folk music.

programme.title: 5 News Weekend
programme.desc: National and international news.

programme.title: When Holidays Go Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of beach holiday nightmares, from tropical storms to children paddling in sewage, a disastrous parasailing excursion, and an aerial attack by Brighton's seagulls.

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Head teacher Sue hoped Bertie the Labrador would be a calming therapy dog, but he's a classroom clown. And Kirsty's show dog Bruce is out of control. Can Graeme Hall help?

programme.title: Tour de France 2026
programme.desc: Rebecca Charlton presents highlights from Stage 21 and the conclusion of the 2026 Tour de France. After three weeks of racing across France and Spain, the peloton arrives in Paris for the traditional finale on the Champs-Élysées. The stage provides one last opportunity for success before the winner of the yellow jersey is crowned. Featuring the key moments from the final day's racing, celebrations from the French capital and a look back at the defining stories and performances of this year's Tour de France.

programme.title: Commonwealth Games 2026
programme.desc: Highlights from day three of the 2026 Commonwealth Games in Glasgow, including the Artistic Gymnastics Women's Individual All-Around Final and nine medals on the line in Swimming and Para Swimming.

programme.title: Boris Johnson: Into Ukraine's Kill Zone

programme.desc: Tanner Gray terkejut mengetahui setelah kematian mantan istrinya, Andrea, bahwa ia memiliki seorang putri berusia 25 tahun, Cyd. Ia dan istrinya bertemu di sebuah kapal pesiar lebih dari 25 tahun yang lalu, di mana keduanya bekerja sebagai instruktur tari. Mereka jatuh cinta dan menikah, tetapi sementara Andrea ingin menetap di kota kecil asalnya dan mengambil alih studio tari orang tuanya, Tanner berasal dari kota kecil dan ingin bepergian sebelum menetap.

programme.title: Midway To Heaven
programme.desc: Sudah bertahun-tahun sejak Ned Stevens, seorang pria menawan yang sukses berkat kerja kerasnya sendiri, kehilangan istrinya, Kate, karena kanker. Namun, ia masih belum bisa melupakan kenangan tentang istrinya dan melanjutkan hidupnya. Tetapi ketika Liz membawa pulang pacar baru dari kampus, Ned mendapati dunianya yang nyaman terbalik ketika Liz mencoba mengalihkan perhatiannya kepada Carol, seorang wanita lajang menarik yang tinggal di lingkungan Ned.

programme.title: Diary Of A Lunatic
programme.desc: Nama saya Trew; ini adalah kisah tentang bagaimana saya dikunjungi oleh Yang Mahakuasa dan Dia meminta saya untuk menuliskan semua yang Dia katakan. Sederhana saja, Dia berbicara, saya panik, hal yang luar biasa terjadi.

programme.title: The Children Of Noisy Village
programme.desc: Kisah tentang anak-anak yang tinggal di Bullerbyn, Swedia, selama bulan-bulan musim semi dan musim panas.

programme.title: Death Squad
programme.desc: Ketika semua jalur komunikasi terputus dengan sebuah fasilitas penelitian ilmiah rahasia yang berlokasi di bekas laboratorium biokimia Uni Soviet, sebuah perusahaan militer swasta dibentuk untuk memasuki fasilitas tersebut guna mencari dan mengevakuasi dokter kepala.

programme.title: 2012: Supernova
programme.desc: Seorang ilmuwan berlomba melawan waktu untuk memasang perisai di antara Bumi dan gelombang ledakan supernova yang mendekat. Di sisi lain, sekte kiamat berusaha menyabotase proyek tersebut dengan keyakinan bahwa hal itu merupakan “kehendak Tuhan” dan membiarkan penduduk Bumi dilalap oleh radiasi intens dari gelombang tersebut.

programme.title: Deadly Vendeta
programme.desc: Ketika seorang petugas pemasyarakatan ditemukan tewas di apartemennya, polisi menduga apakah seorang mantan narapidana membalas dendam padanya; tak lama kemudian, terungkap bahwa pembunuhan tersebut mungkin tidak terkait dengan pekerjaannya, setelah polisi mengungkap keterlibatan korban dalam segitiga cinta yang berbahaya.

programme.title: Heroes And Cowards
programme.desc: Lea Anderson adalah seorang prajurit di Pasukan Khusus Inggris, namun kini ia mulai meragukan pilihan kariernya. Kerahasiaan, pertumpahan darah, dan ketidakmampuan untuk menjalani kehidupan normal menjadi beban yang terlalu berat bagi wanita muda itu, sehingga ia akhirnya memutuskan untuk mengundurkan diri—namun tidak sebelum menjalankan satu misi terakhir di Timur Tengah untuk memastikan timnya dan saudara tirinya, Paul, dapat melewatinya dengan selamat.

programme.title: 24 Hours To D-Day
programme.desc: Sebuah regu pasukan terjun payung Amerika diturunkan di belakang garis musuh di Prancis yang diduduki Nazi untuk menyiapkan suar sinyal guna memandu pasukan Sekutu dalam persiapan menjelang D-Day.

programme.desc: Detektif swasta Nick (Alexander Nevsky) dan Charlie (Casper Van Dien) tinggal dan bekerja di Manila. programme.desc: Ketika seorang petugas pemasyarakatan ditemukan tewas di apartemennya, polisi menduga apakah seorang mantan narapidana membalas dendam padanya; tak lama kemudian, terungkap bahwa pembunuhan tersebut mungkin tidak terkait dengan pekerjaannya, setelah polisi mengungkap keterlibatan korban dalam segitiga cinta yang berbahaya.

programme.title: House Of Wonder

programme.title: Owls & Mice
programme.desc: Meral (8) baru saja pindah ke sebuah kota baru. Ia berusaha mendapatkan teman di sekolah barunya sebelum perkemahan musim gugur sekolah dimulai, tetapi ternyata hal itu lebih sulit dari yang dibayangkannya. Di rumah, ia berteman dengan seekor tikus kecil yang tinggal di kamar barunya, yang ia beri nama Peepeep. Takut orang tuanya akan membunuh Peepeep saat ia pergi, Meral diam-diam membawanya ikut serta. Berkat tikus kecil itu, Meral mendapatkan beberapa teman baru yang tak terduga. Ketika seekor burung hantu menangkap tikus kecil tersebut, Meral menyalahkan teman-teman barunya. Baru setelah mereka bersama-sama pergi ke alam liar untuk mencari muntahan burung hantu yang berisi tulang-belulang Peepeep, Meral akhirnya memahami arti sebenarnya dari persahabatan. OWLS & MICE adalah sekuel dari FROGS & TOADS yang sukses dan memenangkan berbagai penghargaan, dari penulis dan sutradara yang sama, Simone van Dusseldorp.

Dipandu oleh Tahir Moore dan diproduseri oleh Frankie Blair, acara berenergi tinggi ini menghadirkan tawa segar sekaligus merayakan talenta-talenta berbakat yang selama ini kurang mendapat sorotan.

programme.title: Christmas In Scotland

programme.title: The Christmas Letter
programme.desc: Setiap tahun, copywriter pengangguran Joe Michaels membaca surat Natal tahunan temannya yang kaya raya, dan merasa seperti pecundang. Tapi tahun ini akan berbeda.

programme.title: Laugh Riot: The Misadventure
programme.desc: Frankie Blair Presents: Laugh Riot adalah serial komedi stand-up yang dinamis dan menghibur, menampilkan beragam komedian dengan gaya humor yang unik. Dipandu oleh Tahir Moore dan diproduseri oleh Frankie Blair, acara berenergi tinggi ini menghadirkan tawa segar sekaligus merayakan talenta-talenta berbakat yang selama ini kurang mendapat sorotan.

programme.title: Ryde
programme.desc: Teknologi mendekatkan kita. Atau mungkin teknologi juga mendekatkan orang asing, terlalu dekat. Tapi seberapa besar Anda benar-benar bisa mempercayai seseorang? Dengan layanan berbagi tumpangan baru, Anda tidak pernah tahu dengan siapa Anda akan naik mobil. Atau apakah Anda akan bisa keluar dari mobil tersebut.

programme.desc: Leah diculik pada hari pernikahannya oleh mantan tunangannya, Faith. Setelah melarikan diri, Leah mempertanyakan apakah Faith benar-benar delusi atau mencoba melindunginya. Plotnya berkisar pada penculikan Leah, pelarian, dan keraguan tentang motif Faith.

programme.title: Drop Out

programme.title: Bangkit Dari Lumpur
programme.desc: Usai menjadi saksi pembunuhan, seorang wanita dihabisi secara kejam dan organ tubuhnya diambil. Arwahnya yang tidak tenang kemudian kembali bergentayangan demi menuntut balas kepada para pelaku yang telah merenggut nyawanya.

programme.title: Bila Hati Perempuan Menjerit

programme.title: Kutukan Arwah Santet

programme.title: Bunga Cinta Kasih
programme.desc: Benih asmara tumbuh di antara dua remaja beda kasta yang terpilih menjadi pengurus kelas di sekolah mereka. Namun, hubungan cinta monyet tersebut harus menghadapi rintangan berat akibat terganjal restu orang tua.

programme.title: Kuntilanak 3

programme.title: Abdullah Dan Takeshi

programme.title: Nobody's Fool
programme.desc: Emily Atack and Danny Dyer host a strategic reality quiz packed full of drama and deception. With fewer players left and the finale looming, alliances tighten and betrayals feel inevitable. Harry reveals himself to be great at maths and this has not gone unnoticed. The game has now turned - whispered conversations, overheard plots and shifting loyalties dominate the house as players begin thinking not about survival, but about who they want to face in the final. A maths/shooting-led challenge rewards bold, decisive play from Billy and delivers a powerful advantage - but are Harry's days numbered? programme.title: Long Lost Family

In our second case, Peter MacDonald's father snatched him from his mother's arms as a baby as a train carrying her and his older brother Trevor pulled out of Preston station - it was the last time Peter ever saw them, and he longs to see Trevor again after 58 years of missing his big brother.
