programme.title: Love Your Weekend with Alan Titchmarsh
programme.desc: Alan is joined at Manor Farm this time by legendary singer Petula Clark - who talks about her illustrious career - Midsomer Murders' Fiona Dolman, who chats about keeping DCI John Barnaby in check, and former NHS doctor-turned-comedian and author Adam Kaye, who talks about the power of laughter. Alan will also be taking a look the ancient art of horseback falconry and celebrating the very best in British chardonnay this time.

programme.title: Fern Britton: Inside the Vet's
programme.desc: Fern Britton gets up-close-and-personal during the castration of a Bengal cat, and meets Amy the golden retriever and her devoted owner ahead of surgery to remove a lump from her mouth. Later, 12-week-old Labrador retriever puppy Tassie and her new owners are in for a vaccination, and returning canine patients Mono and Marley visit James for their one-year boosters. Pushkins the impatient Persian cat, also a repeat client, is back for help to remove her matted fur. A visiting surgical team is called into The Grove to attend to a bulldog's complex knee injury, and we venture out of the practice to see another specialist at work as clinical animal behaviourist Roz Pooley invites us to experience one of her puppy training classes.

programme.title: Tom Kerridge Cooks...
programme.desc: Chef Tom Kerridge is on the road in Tuscany and Lazio, meeting producers who are just as obsessed with growing ingredients as he is about cooking them. In his bespoke, vintage food truck, he discovers the traditions behind olive oil and the new techniques that are helping to grow rocket in Lazio. Arriving in stunning Tuscany just as the olive harvest begins, he joins Ricardo to learn how here oil is a matter of honour. Then Tom turns his hand to shaking the olives off the tree and join the taste test of the first press, a tradition handed down through the generations. Tom cooks up a feast to honour the harvest: a fig and extra virgin olive oil cake. His journey then takes him to Lazio, where rocket is an obsession. Giancarlo, a local producer, shows him how they get a peppery intensity into the leaves through careful cultivation. After a hard day's work Tom cooks his take on a family favourite: rocket pesto chicken parmigiana with a pesto pasta salad.

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: This time Alan and his team are in Suffolk, where charity shop worker Eileen has a gravel drive and muddy borders as her only garden - with husband Roy suffering from Parkinson's, Eileen is desperate for a peaceful, pretty and safe space for them to share. To create a real garden, Alan designs an inward-looking intimate area surrounded by beautiful year-round colour for Roy and Eileen to enjoy - at the same time, Katie Rushworth is inspired by the couple's love of blues and pinks to plant a wrap-around border and building a covered seating area. Meanwhile, Frances Tophill is tasked with breaking up the vast expanse of fence with clever architectural planting and raised beds, and she must also design a bin store with living roof too - elsewhere, David Domoney heads to Wappenham Manor in Northamptonshire, where the front garden has been transformed into the most spectacular formal garden to welcome the owners home.

programme.title: Live and Let Die
programme.desc: The eighth entry in the James Bond film series and the first to star Roger Moore as 007. James Bond is sent to New York to investigate when three MI6 agents are killed whilst investigating the activities of Dr Kananga - the prime minister of the island of San Monique - and is soon on the trail of a Harlem crime kingpin known as Mr Big. Sensing links between Dr Kananga and Mr Big, Bond follows the men to Louisiana and the Caribbean - and uncovers a horrific plot to flood America with free heroin.

programme.title: The Chase Around The World
programme.desc: The Chase Around The World is a six-part series where Bradley and The Chasers escape the studio to challenge contestants on the world's smartest road trip. Six pairs set off on an epic chase around some of the world's most incredible cities, aiming to win the £100,000 prize. The teams land in Barcelona to take on The Vixen and The Menace, who have set a series of quiz questions that the teams must solve to navigate across the city and find Bradley at the finish line. Competition is fierce as teams do not want to finish last, if they do they face a head-to-head showdown with the Chasers. The final pair will need to beat them to join the other teams and head onto the next city - lose and it's the first flight home. Following a competitive opening quiz and a series of city-wide challenges - including hunting for graffiti art, tackling a theme park drop ride, and playing a football shirt game - the competition remains unpredictable and the race is tight with a dramatic finale.

programme.title: Force Of Nature
programme.desc: Documentary series revealing the incredible ways in which all life is impacted by our journey around the Sun. As climate change accelerates, weather across the planet is becoming more extreme, more violent, and less predictable - a burrowing owl mother on the American prairies must use her extraordinary hearing and a network of underground burrows to save her scattered chicks from intensifying tornadoes, two veteran cheetah brothers in Kenya face record-breaking floods that force them to swim raging rivers and confront deadly rivals before one hunting alone uses the storms to his advantage, a young polar bear in the Arctic loses the summer sea ice she depends on and is driven to stalk reindeer on land, and a troop of chimpanzees in drought-stricken Senegal dig wells and descend into abandoned gold mines in a desperate search for water. These animals across a warming world reveal resilience, ingenuity and courage, but adaptation has limits in the face of relentless change.

programme.title: The Assembly
programme.desc: Rylan faces the grilling of a lifetime from a cast of autistic and learning-disabled interviewers. Has he ever considered a real suntan? Is honesty always the best policy? From cancelled celebrity friends to the contents of his bedside table, nothing is off limits. As the questions come thick and fast, Rylan opens up about infidelity, heartbreak, estrangement from his father and the breakdown that forced him to take life day by day. He reflects on fame, loneliness and coming out, while also helping Natalie figure out how to get her girlfriend down the aisle and revealing whether he and his mum compare notes on guys. Along the way there are huge laughs, unexpected tangents and moments of real vulnerability as The Assembly push Rylan further than he's ever been pushed before. The episode ends with a powerful performance of his favourite song. Expect chaos, honesty, emotion and a side of Rylan rarely seen on television.

programme.desc: Dani and Gatsby are finally official and all loved up, but Chloe Brockett has heard that's there's trouble in paradise for TOWIE's newest couple - will the couple be able to prove the doubters wrong when Dani shows her mettle and confronts Brockett over the rumours? Elsewhere, after a successful first festival for Mady and a good chat with trusted friend Georgia, Chloe Sims is feeling more positive about tackling her 'catastrophising' - not wanting her fears to impact on Mady any longer, Chloe is starting by facing her issues about driving. Will she be able to cross the literal and metaphorical bridge for a better future? Meanwhile, the Dogfather - also known as Dan Edgar - is putting his business plans into full swing as he breaks the news of his new venture to pals Diags and Gatsby, Frankie's prayers may have finally been answered as she goes on her first proper date with new guy Joe, and Amy is hoping that a meeting with her new business partners will push her prosecco dreams on.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. The women board a luxury yacht for a Caribbean adventure, in a crossover event with Below Deck Down Under, but Heather leads the charge against Lisa while Bronwyn's legal controversy follows her onboard.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County
programme.desc: Reality show following the lavish lifestyles of five 'housewives' and their families. The heat builds up at Gina's housewarming party when Jenn learns that Tamra has been showing unflattering photos of her from the past, the group visit New Orleans and embark on a riverboat cruise where Emily suggests that Shannon is holding Jenn back from moving forward with Tamra, Gina and Jenn share updates on the dynamics in their home lives, and the ladies indulge in some local fare as they reveal their favourite sexual positions.

programme.title: Dinner Date
programme.desc: Chef Nelly is going to be given five menus, each put together by a potential blind date. The five men behind the menus have all come up with a three course meal but Nelly will only be having dinner with three of them. He will choose his dates based on the menus he most likes the look of. But when the dinners have been eaten and the dates are done, who will he want to see for seconds?

programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Rylan Clark-Neal hosts a revamp of the iconic game show where three pairs of shoppers go wild in the aisles as they compete in the ultimate supermarket challenge to win a 3,000-pound prize - along with the classic Supermarket Sweep quizzes, trolley dashes and pastel jumpers, the revamped show features exciting new games, challenges and some famous faces.

programme.title: The Floor US
programme.desc: Rob Lowe hosts the American version of the dramatic and fast-paced game show where 81 contestants compete in a high-tension battle of knowledge, nerve and strategy. Standing on a vast floor made up of 81 squares - each representing a unique category - players go head-to-head in quick-fire duels. Win, and you take your opponent's square - lose and you leave The Floor for good. As territories grow and the competition intensifies, only the sharpest minds will survive - in the end, one contestant will dominate The Floor and take home the ultimate 50,000-pound prize.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: Pete is taking his title of Love Guru seriously and is whisking everyone away to a singles' retreat - it's perfect timing for his partner in crime Lockie to return, but will the singles be opening up their hearts and minds with workshops, insightful classes and practical tips on offer, or will the mix of different personalities lead to explosive encounters? Elsewhere, new beginnings are on the horizon for Sims - Chloe is not only moving house, but also off on an exciting work trip to Paris for Fashion Week. Will this be the start of a worldwide make-up career for Sims, and will this big break make Sims realise that life really is beginning at 40? Meanwhile, Dan and Amber are in the glow of new parenthood with puppy Oliver, but they have yet to pass the ultimate test - their parents meeting each other - and there are new revelations even though Dani managed to shut down rumours about her and Gatsby's relationship. Is there unresolved history between Gatsby and Chloe Brockett?

programme.title: Evan Almighty
programme.desc: Comedy sequel. News reporter Evan Baxter once witnessed a series of miraculous events that happened to his colleague Bruce Nolan. These events occurred because God had given his powers to Bruce in order for Bruce to experience what life is like when you are all-powerful, all-seeing, and all-knowing. Now elected to Congress, Evan has recently moved with his wife and children to Virginia so that he can begin his political career. However, when Evan is about to take the Pledge of Allegiance for the first time, God visits him. His life is then turned upside down when God asks him to build an Ark ahead of a great flood. Although Evan pledged to change the world in the slogan for his run for Congress, Evan is nevertheless sceptical of God's order. However, a series of unusual events - including flocks of birds swarming upon Evan - eventually change his mind. How will Evan fulfil God's will, build an Ark, and survive the flood?

programme.desc: Drama series set in the 1950s and adapted from the novels by James Runcie. When Theo Graham confesses to Sidney and Geordie that he attacked and killed his landlord Eric Whittaker, they rush to the boarding house and find the alleged victim alive and well, along with his teenage daughter Joan and her stepmother Vivian. Back at the station - despite his protestations that Eric will come after him - Geordie sends the young man on his way. Just hours later, Eric is killed in a hit and run as Sidney and Geordie look on. Meanwhile, Sidney is drawn deeper into the twisted emotional world of the boarding house. Who is Vivian trying to protect?

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Drama series set in the 1950s and adapted from the novels by James Runcie. As the trial of local teen Gary Bell approaches, Sidney and Geordie find themselves at loggerheads regarding his guilt. Meanwhile, Sidney is asked by Reggie Lawson to perform an exorcism at his home and stable yards as he is convinced that the spirit of his dead wife Anna haunts the place. Believing this to be a husband's desperate grief, Sidney hopes his words have given Reggie some solace. That night, Geordie summons Sidney back - Reggie has hanged himself in the same spot as Anna. Investigating Reggie's death at least gives Sidney and Geordie a shared goal again, but why would Reggie take his life when his finest horse is set to triumph at its next race?

programme.title: Trial and Retribution
programme.desc: Blue Eiderdown - Part One: First of a two-part drama. A young prostitute plunges to her death from a block of luxury flats - had she discovered the identity of her mother's killer? [S]

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Drama series about a Cornish police detective. When unexplained killings rock the Bodmin community, locals are convinced that the 'beast' is back - struggling against myth and the media, the team are alarmed when Kersey fails to return from the moor.

programme.title: George & Mildred
programme.desc: Domestic sitcom spin-off from the hit '70s show Man About the House. George blows the dust off his little black book when an old flame from Mildred's past turns up.

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Drama series about a Cornish detective. When unresolved serial killings bubble to the surface when pathologist Franks notices similarities with a young woman found strangled, Wycliffe and the team must delve back 11 years to establish if there is a link.

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Detective drama series. Wycliffe and the team are called in to investigate the tragic events that unfold after a wedding with a bizarre guest list: the bride and groom, who have only known each other for three weeks, had advertised for guests to attend the ceremony in Penzance... and the next day saw one of the couple found stabbed to death in their luxurious honeymoon hotel.

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Detective drama series. Wycliffe and the team are baffled when a known petty criminal turns into a killer, and Kelsey receives some bad news.

programme.title: Endeavour

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: The irrepressible Larkins return and larger in numbers as young Primrose goes courting and Mariette gives Pop and Ma a 'perfick' gift.

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Primrose continues her pursuit of Reverend Candy, who discovers that paying tax is not the only thing that Pop and Ma have neglected to do... meanwhile, Mademoiselle Dupont is overwhelmed by Home Farm and takes to her bed, and Charley has a new money-making idea involving strawberries.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Alan King, co-owner of King’s Crystal with his brother Charles, is killed in a car accident in Shanghai during a business trip with his brother Charles and accountant Peter Baxter - the company faces bankruptcy and the workforce, which is led by volatile glassblower Jack Tewson, is devastated. Tensions are brewing throughout Midsomer Magna - as Alan’s son Ian shuns his mother Hilary to grieve with his close friend David Monroe, Sophie Baxter, the daughter of Peter, is in love with Ian while undertaker James Mason is in love with Sophie. Meanwhile, Cully is rehearsing for a production of Hamlet at the Midsomer Open Air Theatre which has been refurbished thanks to Alan’s fundraising - as Barnaby watches Cully in the performance of Hamlet, he realises that the play contains a message sent by Ian King before he died. Can the detective pick up the trail of clues to lead him to the killer?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby is impressed when blues guitarist Jack 'Axeman' McKinley rolls into Causton with his waiflike daughter Willow for a reunion of the band Hired Gun at the Midsomer Rocks Festival - drummer Nicky Harding, alcoholic diva Mimi Clifton and lead singer Gary Cooper join him, but Gary becomes paranoid after finding a dead sheep, a disembowelled pig, and a skinned rabbit. When Mimi drops dead, could a missing band member hold the key... or will Barnaby find that one of his heroes is a murderer?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: David Mostyn is shocked to find his mother Delyth in bed with Dr James Kirkwood, a senior partner in the Midsomer Market surgery, but the beautiful divorcee is delighted when James uses the occasion to propose to her - her daughter Megan, James' practice manager, is equally outraged and especially when Delyth tells her they are planning to sell up and travel the world. James also has the difficult task of telling Dorothy Hutton, his late wife's mother who is still grieving, and asks his surgery partner Alan Delaney to check on Dorothy while lending him his brand-new Range Rover for the journey - when Alan has to leave the car during a storm, a pick-up truck drives into him at speed and kills him. Barnaby and Jones dig into Alan's past and discover that James once accused him of stealing 30,000 pounds from the practice, but it was put down to clerical error and the two doctors made up - as Barnaby and Jones investigate, they find that they must travel to Snowdonia to unravel the truth.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Rivalry between traditional film photographers and digital camera fans in the village of Luxton Deeping reaches fever pitch at an annual photographic society exhibition when snapper Steve Bright threatens black and white film enthusiast Lionel Bell - Lionel is then photographing his favourite oak trees when he is strangled with the cord from his light meter. Lionel's diary shows that Barnaby visited him the night he died and a glass with his fingerprints is found... but is he being framed?

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama series. DCI Vera Stanhope investigates the death of a young woman in a suspicious fire that rips through a coastal holiday park - when Vera discovers that the victim was locked in her cabin, she realises that this is more than just an accident. Supported by her trusted team, Vera must use all her tenacity and instinct to expose the deep rift at the heart of a fractured family and ultimately discover the truth behind the woman's tragic fate.

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Inspector Morse and Sergeant Lewis focus their attention on a respectable academic family as they investigate the death of an eminent scientist who was attacked before he was due to deliver a controversial speech about the environment.

programme.title: George & Mildred
programme.desc: Domestic sitcom spin-off from the hit '70s show Man About the House. George finally finds his vocation, but it's a line of work that may make him unpopular.

programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: George & Mildred
programme.desc: Domestic sitcom. George is looking for a job and Mildred has high hopes for her prospective breadwinner, but she is left disappointed as usual.

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Detective drama series. Wycliffe and Kersey exchange strong words as they investigate a disturbing case involving the contamination of jars of baby food in a local supermarket by a blackmailer - meanwhile, the disciplinary enquiry into Wycliffe's team continues to run its course.

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Drama series about a Cornwall police detective. Wycliffe and the team find themselves dealing with more than a missing persons case when a lone yachtswoman disappears and her boat is discovered scuttled on the seabed.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series set in Cornwall. Martin and Louisa are looking for a nursery for James Henry with Janice gone, Mrs Tishell is shocked to learn that Al has very high blood pressure, and Ruth is approached about selling her farm - elsewhere, Louisa helps with the diagnosis of a pupil which spurs her on to explore a possible career change, but this is not welcome news for Martin as he dislikes change of any kind... even if it could be for the better.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Lewis and Hathaway investigate the death of Professor Miranda Thornton after she apparently killed herself when her dating video was leaked onto a vicious media blog - Lewis does not believe that Thornton's death was suicide and has qualms about Kit Renton, the blog's founder, and Sophie Leland, the owner of the dating website. When one of Renton's employees is found murdered, the police realise she must have been killed because she knew something about Thornton's death - as Lewis finds that Thornton, Renton and Leland were all at Oxford together 20 years before, he realises that this is actually an age-old revenge story...

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Tinseltown glamour arrives in St Mary Mead when actress Marina Gregg and her young film director husband Jason Rudd move into Gossington Hall. Keen to fulfil her position as lady of the manor, Marina hosts a drinks reception for the curious locals - including the hall's previous owner, Dolly Bantry. But Marina's new role seems to be threatened when Heather Badcock, an excitable fan, drinks a poisoned cocktail. Was the drink really meant for Heather? And if not, who was the target? Marple and Inspector Hewitt set out to investigate and uncover a string of secrets about the mysterious guests at the party. Several people have strong connections to Marina and Jason - but is one of them capable of murder? And can Marple and Hewitt uncover the killer in time?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Nick Cheyney - the director of a new film version of The Scarlet Pimpernel - is beheaded by a guillotine on set, there is no shortage of suspects, They include an actor whose career was ruined by Cheyney, a woman who bore his child after a drunken one-night stand, and an embittered extra - when medical evidence shows that Cheyney was drugged with morphine before he died, can Barnaby and Jones find the killer before the case becomes as bloody as the French Revolution?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When an old colleague of DCI Barnaby's is found murdered, a sex scandal at Causton police station 16 years previously comes back to haunt him as his investigation takes him to Midsomer Holm, a halfway house for ex-prisoners founded by Lord Holm, a man who also served time for the murder of his wife. As the police try to find links between the suspects and a seedy group known as the Friday Nighters - and another person goes missing - will Barnaby and Jones find the real villain in time?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A family feud dating back to the First World War comes to a head in Midsomer Parva after the unveiling of a war memorial - after Mayor Dave Hicks blames Johnny Hammond for the death of his grandfather, who was shot for cowardice at the Somme, retired colonel Henry Hammond is murdered and Barnaby and Jones discover that the dysfunctional families are connected by dangerous secrets.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Two contrasting weddings are taking place in Midsomer - Cully's to Simon, and local baronet Ned Fitzroy's to Beth Porteous. As Cully suffers from last-minute doubts, Barnaby becomes an unwelcome guest at Ned's marriage when the maid of honour is stabbed to death - what are the secrets of Midsomer high society, and will Barnaby get to his daughter's ceremony on time?

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Vera and her team find themselves investigating a 30-year-old mystery when the remains of a teenage girl are found half-buried in a Northumberland wood - the remains are identified as those of miner's daughter Carrie Telling, who vanished during the miners' strike in 1984. Photographs recovered from Carrie's camera yield further revelations for Vera, but what did Carrie discover on the day that she vanished that ultimately led to her death?

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Detective series. A dead baby leads the team of Cornish detectives to the discovery of a bizarre pagan sect.

programme.title: Trigger Point
programme.desc: Drama series following Lana Washington, an experienced bomb disposal officer working for the Metropolitan Police. programme.title: Bu Nad Suka Masak
programme.desc: Resep makanan yang praktis dan sederhana untuk menu sehari-hari, yang diolah dan disajikan oleh Bu Nadia (Bu Nad).

programme.title: Rahasia Dapur Sophia Dan Eva
programme.desc: Acara masak yang dipandu oleh Sophia Latjuba dan Eva Celia. Duet ibu dan anak ini mencoba berbagai resep yang disesuaikan dengan pola hidup sehat dan disampaikan secara ringan

programme.title: Jajan Terus
programme.desc: Program reality show kuliner. Seorang presenter berlaku sebagai penantang seorang bintang tamu untuk jajan dengan challenge uang 100-500rb rupiah. Presenter & bintang tamu ada obrolan santai, review makanan sedang viral di sosmed.

programme.title: Cooking & Cooqueen
programme.desc: Program reality show yang menggabungkan elemen challenge, talkshow, dan eksplorasi budaya kuliner. Setiap episode menghadirkan dua peserta: satu public figure (artis, influencer, atau tokoh masyarakat) dan satu chef profesional.

programme.title: Cooked Cheeeck
programme.desc: Pertemuan Chef dengan bintang tamu spesial yang akan dimasakin oleh chef sambil mengobrol santai.

programme.title: First Bite
programme.desc: Program kuliner yang mengulas dan mengeksplor berbagai hidangan takjil untuk menemani iftar atau bahkan untuk sahur.

programme.title: Laskar Pelangi 2
programme.desc: Ikal dan Arai menjalani hari-hari menimba ilmu di Sorbonne. Ikal mengambil master ekonomi sementara Arai berkutat dengan ilmu biologi. Di antara harapan ayah Ikal yang menghendaki mereka menjadi ahli pupuk dan apoteker.

programme.title: Kiko S3
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang keinginan Occi untuk bisa seperti Bulk Boggard yang kuat. Kiko pun berusaha membantu gurita kesayangannya tersebut agar bisa mewujudkan impiannya.

programme.title: Ricis The Adventure
programme.desc: Ricis bersama timnya menemukan ponsel misterius dan tersedot ke layar ponsel. Ternyata mereka diseret ke portal yang mengirim mereka ke Socidia City, kota metaverse tempat semua aktivitas jejaring sosial di dunia nyata.

programme.title: Dragons
programme.desc: Menceritakan seorang Putra seorang ketua Viking berteman dengan musuh mereka, seekor naga. Kisah ini berfokus pada kejadian terjadi di desa Berk Viking, di mana peternakan penduduk setempat kerap dicuri & diserang oleh seekor naga

programme.title: Rogue
programme.desc: A cynical American travel writer is among the stranded riverboat passengers who become fodder for a monstrous crocodile.

programme.title: Primal
programme.desc: Hunter and collector Frank Walsh sails to America with a priceless white jaguar and a dangerous political assassin. When the prisoner manages to break free, Walsh must utilize his expert skills to capture the dangerous killer -- not dead, but alive.

programme.title: Bait
programme.desc: A freak tsunami traps a group of people in a submerged grocery store. As they try to escape, they are hunted by white sharks that are hungry for meat.

programme.title: Killer Whale
programme.desc: Best friends Maddie and Trish embark on a spectacular adventure to a private lagoon halfway across the world. However, their peaceful retreat soon becomes a terrifying fight for survival when a killer whale seeks vengeance for a life in captivity.

programme.title: Voyagers
programme.desc: With the future of the human race at stake, a group of young men and women embark on an expedition to colonize a distant planet. As life on the ship descends into chaos, they soon become consumed by fear, lust and an insatiable hunger for power.

programme.title: The Giver
programme.desc: A teen (Brenton Thwaites) discovers the dark truth about his community's secret past from an old man (Jeff Bridges) who is the sole keeper of their world's memories.

programme.title: Divergent
programme.desc: In a future society, people are divided into factions based on their personalities. After a young woman (Shailene Woodley) learns she is a Divergent and will never fit into any one group, she uncovers a conspiracy to destroy all those like her.

programme.title: Knight And Day
programme.desc: When a fugitive couple's glamorous and sometimes deadly adventure erupts into a maze of double-crosses, close escapes, false identities, and head-spinning romantic snafus, they come to realize that all they can count on is each other.

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: In Wanted, a slacker is recruited by a secret assassin fraternity, uncovering hidden powers and dark truths as he trains under elite killers, including Angelina Jolie and Morgan Freeman.

programme.title: Fist Of Legend
programme.desc: In 1937, a Chinese martial artist returns to Shanghai to find his teacher dead and his school harassed by the Japanese.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In *Oblivion*, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it's a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: The Chinese Widow
programme.desc: In 1941, after bombing Tokyo, a US pilot makes an emergency landing in China. A local widow rescues him and risks everything to hide him from Japanese forces.

programme.title: Mulholland Dr.
programme.desc: A hopeful actress in Los Angeles befriends an amnesiac woman, and as they search for her identity, reality and illusion blur in a dreamlike thriller about ambition, identity, and Hollywood's dark side.

programme.title: Mulholland Dr.
programme.desc: Setelah kecelakaan mobil di Mulholland Drive membuat seorang wanita amnesia, dia dan seorang calon bintang Hollywood mencari petunjuk dan jawaban di seluruh Los Angeles dalam usaha berliku yang melampaui mimpi dan kenyataan.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Robin Hood in Ridley Scott's epic reimagining—fighting corruption and sparking a rebellion that turns a humble outlaw into a timeless symbol of freedom.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: Seorang Tentara Salib yang tangguh dalam perang dan komandan Moornya melancarkan pemberontakan yang berani terhadap mahkota Inggris yang korup.

programme.title: The Mummy (2017)
programme.desc: Tom Cruise stars in The Mummy, a thrilling new take on the legend. When an ancient queen awakens in modern times, she unleashes a terrifying force, sparking a battle across continents.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Di Mesir kuno, cinta terlarang memicu pengkhianatan yang membuat seorang pendeta dikutuk selamanya. Pada 1926, para penjelajah menemukan makam itu dan tanpa sengaja membangkitkannya sehingga mereka harus menghadapi kejahatan kuno yang terbangun.

programme.title: Corner Office
programme.desc: Misanthropic worker Orson detests his lazy colleagues. He finds a secret, magical office that boosts his productivity and status, but his coworkers can't see the room and grow to resent his success.

programme.title: Corner Office
programme.desc: Saat Orson, karyawan terbaru The Authority, mendapati dirinya terjebak dalam absurditas kehidupan korporat, keterasingannya semakin dalam ketika ia menemukan sebuah ruangan yang menurutnya tidak ada.

programme.title: Twin Dragons
programme.desc: Identical twins – a musician living in New York, and a mechanic living in Hong Kong – are separated in childhood but are unexpectedly reunited years later when the musician travels to Hong Kong for a concert.

programme.title: Twin Dragons
programme.desc: Saudara kembar identik dipisahkan sejak lahir, yang satu menjadi mekanik jalanan, dan yang lainnya menjadi konduktor konser klasik yang ternama. Akhirnya bertemu di usia dewasa, mereka disangka satu sama lain dan terjerat dalam dunia masing-masing.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In *Oblivion*, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it's a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: Jack Harper, seorang tukang reparasi drone yang ditempatkan di Bumi yang telah dirusak oleh perang dengan makhluk luar angkasa, mempertanyakan identitasnya setelah menyelamatkan wanita yang terus muncul dalam mimpinya.

programme.title: The Chinese Widow

programme.title: The Chinese Widow
programme.desc: Pada tahun 1941, setelah membom Tokyo, seorang pilot AS melakukan pendaratan darurat di Tiongkok. Seorang janda setempat menyelamatkannya dan mempertaruhkan segalanya untuk menyembunyikannya dari pasukan Jepang.

programme.title: Birdman
programme.desc: In an effort to jumpstart his career after his superhero movie franchise dies, a psychotic actor writes, directs, and stars in a broadway play that becomes an unlikely hit after he tries to shoots himself in the head during the premiere.

programme.desc: Seorang aktor superhero yang kariernya telah merosot mencoba menghidupkan kembali kariernya yang memudar dengan menulis, menyutradarai, dan membintangi sebuah produksi Broadway.

programme.desc: When a fugitive couple's glamorous and sometimes deadly adventure erupts into a maze of double-crosses, close escapes, false identities, and head-spinning romantic snafus, they come to realize that all they can count on is each other.

programme.title: Knight And Day
programme.desc: Seorang wanita muda terlibat dengan seorang mata-mata yang dipermalukan yang mencoba membersihkan namanya.

programme.title: The Chinese Widow
programme.desc: In 1941, after bombing Tokyo, a US pilot makes an emergency landing in China. A local widow rescues him and risks everything to hide him from Japanese forces.

programme.title: The Chinese Widow
programme.desc: Pada tahun 1941, setelah membom Tokyo, seorang pilot AS melakukan pendaratan darurat di Tiongkok. Seorang janda setempat menyelamatkannya dan mempertaruhkan segalanya untuk menyembunyikannya dari pasukan Jepang.

programme.title: Fist Of Legend
programme.desc: In 1937, a Chinese martial artist returns to Shanghai to find his teacher dead and his school harassed by the Japanese.

programme.title: Fist Of Legend
programme.desc: Saat belajar di Jepang, Chen Zhen menemukan beberapa pelajar asal Tiongkok menghilang dan tanpa sengaja mengungkap sejumlah konspirasi kelompok Naga Hitam.

programme.title: The Odyssey: The Making Of An Epic
programme.desc: Director Christopher Nolan invites you into the world of The Odyssey, his mythic action epic of Homer's saga, and the first film shot entirely with IMAX Film Cameras.

programme.title: The Odyssey: Making Of An Epic (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Setelah Perang Troya, Odysseus menghadapi perjalanan berbahaya kembali ke Ithaca, bertemu dengan berbagai makhluk seperti Cyclops Polyphemus, Siren, dan Calypso di sepanjang jalan.

programme.title: L.A. Confidential
programme.desc: Amidst corruption, murder and the glamour of famous movie stars, three police officer fight to uncover the truth of a brutal mass murder.

programme.title: L.A. Confidential (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Seiring meningkatnya korupsi di Los Angeles tahun 1950-an, tiga polisi—satu yang taat aturan, satu yang brutal, dan satu yang bejat menyelidiki serangkaian pembunuhan dengan cara keadilan mereka sendiri.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Robin Hood in Ridley Scott's epic reimagining—fighting corruption and sparking a rebellion that turns a humble outlaw into a timeless symbol of freedom.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: Seorang Tentara Salib yang tangguh dalam perang dan komandan Moornya melancarkan pemberontakan yang berani terhadap mahkota Inggris yang korup.

programme.title: The Kingdom
programme.desc: Sebuah tim agen pemerintah AS dikirim untuk menyelidiki pemboman fasilitas Amerika di Timur Tengah.

programme.title: Around The World In 80 Days
programme.desc: Phileas Fogg adalah seorang penemu yang yakin bahwa ia dapat berkeliling dunia dalam waktu 80 hari dengan didampingi oleh pelayannya yang setia, Passepartout, dan seorang pemandu jalan nan cantik bernama Monique.

programme.title: Knight And Day
programme.desc: Seorang wanita muda terlibat dengan seorang mata-mata yang dipermalukan yang mencoba membersihkan namanya.

programme.title: Miami Vice

programme.title: Kill Cruise
programme.desc: When a washed-out German sailor in a drunken state agrees to take two British women from Gibraltar to the West Indies in his sailboat, they realize that it's not going to be smooth sailing, and it will take all their wits to survive the trip.

programme.title: Premier Padel - Summary (Magazine)
programme.desc: The top of world padel brings together the best rackets on the planet. With spectacular ball exchanges and incredible physical demands, the professional circuit offers pure entertainment in iconic arenas, taking the sport to a new level.

programme.title: Nascar Cup Series 2026 - Highlights (Resumo)
programme.desc: The most electrifying moments of the NASCAR Cup Series brought together in an unmissable summary. Relive decisive overtakes, pit strategies and door-to-door duels on the most iconic ovals, where the elite of American motorsports fight for victory and a spot in the coveted Playoffs.

programme.title: Nascar Truck Series - Resumo (Magazine)

programme.desc: Kisah ambisi seorang pengusaha yang mengabaikan peringatan penjaga hutan dan menghancurkan seluruh pohon demi pabriknya. Kini, tersisa satu benih terakhir yang menjadi harapan untuk memulihkan kembali kelestarian alam.

programme.desc: Empat tahun setelah bencana di Jurassic Park, nasib dinosaurus liar yang masih berkeliaran di Isla Nublar berada di ujung tanduk.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: Sebuah tim elit mata-mata super harus bergabung dengan Agen Classified dan tim penyamarannya, North Wind, untuk menyelamatkan dunia dari penjahat Dr. Octavius ​​Brine!

programme.title: Wild Wild
programme.desc: Seorang pengacara yang gemar berbohong terkena kutukan ajaib yang membuatnya hanya bisa berkata jujur selama tepat satu hari.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Sekelompok arkeolog tanpa sengaja membangkitkan pendeta Mesir kuno yang terkutuk, memicu teror supranatural yang mengancam dunia.

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Sebuah kota yang indah terancam ketika gunung berapi yang telah lama tidak aktif meletus, menyemburkan lava dan menghujani kehancuran pada penduduk.

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Sebuah kota yang indah terancam ketika gunung berapi yang telah lama tidak aktif meletus, menyemburkan lava dan menghujani kehancuran pada penduduk.

programme.title: The Windmill Massacre
programme.desc: Tujuh turis dengan masa lalu yang kelam terjebak di pabrik setan di pedesaan Belanda. Saat mereka diserang satu per satu karena dosa mereka, malam itu menjadi ajang pertarungan untuk bertahan hidup.

programme.title: Zhong Kui Exorcism
programme.desc: Jong-Gyu, seorang pengusir setan, melawan monster rubah yang menggoda setelah mereka menghancurkan hidupnya. Didorong oleh amarah, ia berlatih dengan seorang pertapa, menggunakan pedang pembunuh iblis. Perjalanannya mencapai puncaknya dalam pertarungan melawan raja iblis dunia bawah.

programme.title: Chapter 1: Mae Nak Reborn
programme.desc: Mae Nak, sang istri hantu, kembali untuk membalas dendam atas seorang wanita hamil yang mengalami pelecehan seksual dan kehilangan bayinya. Tidak seorang pun dapat mengenali si penyerang kecuali Mae Nak, yang berubah menjadi roh jahat untuk menghukum si penyerang atas perbuatan jahatnya.

programme.title: Model Family, Ep 2
programme.desc: Sebuah keluarga dengan orang tua tunggal pindah ke sebuah lingkungan baru yang kehidupan warganya tampak sempurna. Namun, ternyata semuanya tak seperti yang mereka kira.

programme.desc: Juri yang depresi terjebak di rumah selama penyebaran Covid. Saat ibunya pergi mengunjungi sang nenek, ia harus menjalankan restoran Kimbap sampai ibunya kembali.

programme.title: Honey Sweet
programme.desc: Chi-ho adalah seorang perancang produk nan sukses, sementara Il-young bekerja di suatu perusahaan pinjaman. Mereka bertemu saat Chi-ho mencoba membayar hutang kakaknya. Kebetulan membuat mereka menjadi dekat.

programme.title: Only God Knows Everything
programme.desc: Usai ditahbiskan, Pastor Do-woon mendengar pengakuan yang menguak hilangnya sang ibu 13 tahun lalu. Terbelenggu rahasia suci dan dendam, ia memilih memburu kebenaran.

programme.title: The Night Owl (TVN Movies)
programme.desc: Seorang tunanetra yang merupakan ahli akupunktur secara ajaib mampu melihat secara normal di malam hari, dan ia tidak sengaja menyaksikan kematian putra mahkota.

programme.title: Spiritwalker (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Seorang pria kehilangan ingatannya dan terbangun di dalam tubuh baru setiap 12 jam. Di tengah pencarian identitasnya, ia bertemu dengan seorang wanita yang mengaku mengenal dirinya.

programme.title: The Favor (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Sebuah film okultisme tentang perjuangan sebuah keluarga untuk melepaskan diri dari kutukan mengerikan yang diberikan kepada mereka sebagai imbalan atas sebuah mukjizat yang sangat mereka dambakan.

programme.title: The Boys
programme.desc: Sebuah cerita tentang pemimpin tim investigasi, Hwang Joon-cheol, yang bertugas menyelidiki anak laki-laki yang dicurigai melakukan perampokan di supermarket kota setempat, 'Woori Super'.

programme.title: Emergency Declaration
programme.desc: Sejumlah kematian misterius yang terjadi di dalam pesawat memaksa sang pilot untuk meminta izin pendaratan darurat tanpa syarat.

programme.title: The Night Owl
programme.desc: Seorang tunanetra yang merupakan ahli akupunktur secara ajaib mampu melihat secara normal di malam hari, dan ia tidak sengaja menyaksikan kematian putra mahkota.

programme.title: Spiritwalker
programme.desc: Seorang pria kehilangan ingatannya dan terbangun di dalam tubuh baru setiap 12 jam. Di tengah pencarian identitasnya, ia bertemu dengan seorang wanita yang mengaku mengenal dirinya.

programme.title: Bear Man
programme.desc: Dua ekor beruang dari sebuah Institut Teknologi berubah menjadi manusia setelah memakan bawang putih dan mugwort. Kini, salah satu dari mereka telah tumbuh menjadi polisi, sementara yang lain menjadi seorang gangster.

programme.title: On The Line (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Seo-joon kehilangan segalanya akibat penipuan suara (voice phishing) dan menyusup ke sebuah organisasi di Tiongkok untuk bertemu dengan Kwak Pro, perancang di balik sistem penipuan tersebut.

programme.title: I, The Executioner (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Detektif pemula Park Sun Woo dan Seo Do-Cheol, seorang veteran dari tim Divisi Penyelidikan Kejahatan Kekerasan, mengejar seorang pembunuh berantai yang mengguncang dunia mereka.

programme.title: Second Sister (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: So-eun, yang sedang berduka setelah kakaknya bunuh diri akibat pelecehan seksual dan cyberbullying, bekerja sama dengan seorang detektif swasta bernama Jun-gyeong untuk mengungkap kebenaran kelam di balik rumor-rumor jahat tersebut.

programme.title: Life Is Beautiful
programme.desc: Se-yeon, yang mengabdikan seluruh hidupnya untuk keluarganya, tiba-tiba menderita penyakit yang sangat parah. Kini, ia bertekad untuk menjalani hidup dengan baik dan mencari cinta pertamanya dengan bantuan suaminya.

programme.title: The Snitch
programme.desc: Dalam lingkaran kejahatan narkoba, informan 'Ya-Dang' menjual informasi kriminal. Penjahat menggunakannya untuk mengurangi hukuman, sementara penegak hukum menggunakannya untuk penangkapan. Ya-Dang, polisi, dan jaksa membentuk segitiga kunci.

programme.title: Honey Sweet
programme.desc: Chi-ho adalah seorang perancang produk nan sukses, sementara Il-young bekerja di suatu perusahaan pinjaman. Mereka bertemu saat Chi-ho mencoba membayar hutang kakaknya. Kebetulan membuat mereka menjadi dekat.

programme.title: Ditto
programme.desc: Ditto mengisahkan seorang mahasiswa teknik di sebuah universitas bernama Kim Yong. Dia mulai masuk kuliah tahun 1995, namun harus cuti hingga tahun 1999 karena menjalani wajib militer. Suatu hari, Yong menemukan sebuah radio antik yang bisa terhubung dengan masa depan. Yong berkomunikasi dengan Kim Mu-Nee, seorang mahasiswi yang hidup dimasa sekarang, berkuliah di jurusan sosiologi. Komunikasi dari dua periode berbeda ini membuat kisah hidup mereka terungkap satu sama lain.

programme.title: The Favor
programme.desc: Sebuah film okultisme tentang perjuangan sebuah keluarga untuk melepaskan diri dari kutukan mengerikan yang diberikan kepada mereka sebagai imbalan atas sebuah mukjizat yang sangat mereka dambakan.

programme.title: Second Sister
programme.desc: Setelah adiknya bunuh diri akibat fitnah dan komentar jahat di dunia maya, So-eun bersama detektif Jun-kyung mengungkap kebenaran di balik kasus yang melibatkan akun-akun anonim.

programme.title: Peninsula (TVN Movies)
programme.desc: Berlatar belakang 4 tahun setelah film "Train To Busan." Masyarakat di semenanjung Korea Selatan yang selamat dari kehancuran, berjuang untuk bertahan hidup.

programme.title: The Swindlers (TVN Movies)
programme.desc: Sekelompok sekutu yang tak terduga dari berbagai latar belakang hukum harus bekerja sama untuk mencapai tujuan bersama: menangkap penipu legendaris paling terkenal di dunia.

programme.title: The Old Woman With The Knife (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Seorang pembunuh bayaran tua yang mahir menyingkirkan penjahat terburuk di masyarakat bertemu dengan seorang anak didik muda yang bersemangat untuk mempelajari keahlian tersebut. Saat mereka menjalin ikatan yang tak terduga, pembunuh veteran itu menemukan tujuan baru di masa senja hidupnya yang penuh kekerasan dan rutinitas.

programme.title: Once We Were Us
programme.desc: Dua mantan kekasih bertemu kembali dalam penerbangan ke Korea, yang membangkitkan kenangan akan pertemuan tak terduga mereka pada tahun 2008, ketika mereka menemukan cinta di tengah hiruk-pikuk Seoul sebelum kehidupan memisahkan mereka.

programme.title: Confession
programme.desc: Seorang pria yang menjadi tersangka kasus pembunuhan mencari bantuan dari seorang pengacara untuk membuktikan bahwa ia tidak bersalah. Saat mereka mulai mengumpulkan bukti-bukti, kebenaran pun perlahan terkuak.

programme.title: Streaming

programme.title: Hello Charlie
programme.desc: Film ini menceritakan tentang Charlie, seorang anak pengantar pizza yang diberi tugas untuk mengirim seekor gorila dari Mumbai ke Diu. Petualangan duo unik tersebut pun dimulai sepanjang perjalanan.

programme.title: Khuda Haafiz 2: Agni Pariksha
programme.desc: Kehidupan Sameer dan Nargis yang menyedihkan berubah menjadi lebih baik usai memutuskan untuk mengadopsi keponakan teman mereka yang yatim piatu, Nandini. Namun, hidup mereka menjadi kacau saat Nandini diculik.

programme.title: Chandu Champion
programme.desc: Seorang pria yang menghadapi satu lawan satu dengan semangat yang tak pernah padam. Semangatnya yang tak tergoyahkan dan sikap pantang menyerahnya membuahkan medali emas perorangan pertama bagi India dalam berbagai bentuk Olimpiade.

programme.desc: Kehidupan Sameer dan Nargis yang menyedihkan berubah menjadi lebih baik usai memutuskan untuk mengadopsi keponakan teman mereka yang yatim piatu, Nandini. Namun, hidup mereka menjadi kacau saat Nandini diculik.

programme.title: Chandu Champion
programme.desc: Seorang pria yang menghadapi satu lawan satu dengan semangat yang tak pernah padam. Semangatnya yang tak tergoyahkan dan sikap pantang menyerahnya membuahkan medali emas perorangan pertama bagi India dalam berbagai bentuk Olimpiade.

programme.title: Bholaa
programme.desc: Setelah keluar dari penjara dengan keinginan untuk bertemu dengan putrinya, rencana Bholaa terhenti oleh penangkapan narkoba yang diatur dengan baik.

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: 125 years of Mercedes Benz - The largest Mercedes Benz meets at Berlin Tempelhof Airport with lots of highlights such as the legendary Silver Arrows and their even more legendary drivers, visitors and classic vehicles from all over the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The open-air season can start with these three convertibles! Smart is sending the latest version of its roofless dwarf to dealers. It is available as a 3-cylinder petrol engine with 71 or 90 hp. The Mini Convertible is bigger – and not just under the hood. It offers space for four people and the output ranges from 105 to 190 hp. When it comes to pure roadster feeling, there can only be one – the Mazda MX-5. The fourth generation of the topless classic in Perfect Ride. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: Super Seven – when you hear these words, car fans first think of Lotus. Because Colin Chapman developed the open kit racer, i.e. a kit car, in the 1950s. (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Carbon fiber on motorcycles – does that make sense? Carbon: The fabric structure of the magical material from Formula 1 shimmers with high quality. Highly priced, but ultra stable and ultra light and therefore extremely attractive for racing and street motorcycles. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: The oil states in the Gulf – Actually everything here is big, bigger, biggest. Only an exclusive group of people like it Mini. Why? How can such a small car put such a big smile on people's faces? Fans come to the mini-festival from all over Arabia. Our research for mini-crazy people starts right here, in Dubai. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: An inconspicuous industrial building in Regensburg, Bavaria. The most innovative German bicycle manufacturer is currently based here: PG Bikes. The Regensburg-based company develops and produces electric bikes with a retro look. The boss and idea generator of PG Bikes is 33-year-old Manuel Ostner. After owning his own scooter workshop, he began pimping up bicycles and eventually producing e-bikes. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are spectacular and environmentally friendly, the most extravagant and fastest electric and hybrid cars in the world: whether Tesla, McLaren P1, Ferrari La Ferrari or Renovo Coupe, the battery- and hybrid-powered cars impress not only with their fascinating design, but also with intelligent technology, breathtaking acceleration and unique dynamics. Dream Cars presents the most exciting e-cars in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Their reputation is legendary, rally enthusiasts adore them: the monster rally cars of the so-called Group B. At the beginning of the 80s, a new classification entered rally sport. Suddenly turbocharged all-wheel-drive racing vehicles with up to 500 hp race across the international slopes. The drivers can barely control the vehicles, but with their sound and unbridled power they exert a huge fascination. Only the most serious accidents with dead drivers and fans put an end to the absolute irrationality. Today these cars enjoy cult status and are expensive collector's items. Also legendary: the BMW M E30 in the DTM version. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: The new mobile magazine presents the latest trends and innovations in the automotive industry every week. Whether compact everyday heroes, windy city runabouts for the urban jungle, beefy SUVs for family trips or modern electric and hydrogen vehicles: our experts will take you on a test drive through the world of automobility of today and tomorrow. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: If there is a typical BMW, it is the BMW 3 Series. It's fast, it's cult, it's the epitome of the sports sedan: the BMW 3 Series. Since its debut in 1975, the 3 Series has been the undisputed leader of the premium segment. More than 13 million customers worldwide have chosen a BMW 3 Series. The 3 Series is the right car for every requirement: it is a family sedan, sports car, tuning object and racing car. Car History shows all models and the entire history of the '3 Series'. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name Green Hell. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many racers at heart race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the Green Hell is a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: This time in Enduropark Training – Shirin takes part in an Enduro; Take part in off-road training at the Enduropark Hechlingen and realize that it is anything but a picnic. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The latest innovations in the automotive industry have been presented in Paris since 1898. This makes the Paris Motor Show the oldest trade fair in the world and provides an insight into the automotive world of tomorrow. One attempt by manufacturers is to replace the traditional combustion engine with alternative drives. Mercedes-Benz founded the Generation EQ sub-brand specifically for this purpose. Under the slogan "think new", Volkswagen wants to introduce 20 new electric models by 2020 and finally put the diesel scandal behind it. In addition to the drive of the future, Perfect Ride presents the manufacturers' design visions. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. Rearview mirror puts the NSU Ro 80 in the spotlight today. With its revolutionary aerodynamic body and its new engine technology, a Wankel engine, it caused a sensation when it first appeared in 1967. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Pimping, boarding, showing off - today's topics in tuning: Racing flounder with motorcycle power - we're hitting the Hockenheimring in magic X one. Full blast: The D1 Drift Championship – driving sideways at the absolute limit. Tuning EXPO Saarbruecken: 1000 cars, 230 exhibitors and the choice of the Tuning Expo Cover Girl (channel info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The Stunt Heroes are on tour! On an industrial site in Thuringia they find the ideal place to jump with their stunt car across a moving truck trailer. Problem: the trailer is brand new and must under no circumstances be broken... A special challenge for stunt coordinator Domi and his team! (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: In this episode, presenter Martin Utberg accompanies visitors to the Cars & Friends event at the Hans-Peter Porsche Traumwerk in Anger near Salzburg through a weekend full of automotive passion and enthusiasm. The focus throughout the day will be on motorsport legends Walter Röhrl, Christian Geistdörfer and Hans Joachim Strietzel Stuck, who will create enormous enthusiasm among visitors. Top Speed ​​is also taking part in the celebrations surrounding the 50th anniversary of the VW Golf GTI, where hundreds of Golf owners from Germany and Austria travel to the dream factory. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Compact high-performance models have a long-standing tradition at BMW. From the 2002 turbo to the 1 Series M Coupe to the current M2. We take a closer look at the second generation and test the drifting potential, racing and everyday qualities of the M2. What does he do best? We also look at its history and development and take a look at its competitors. (Station info).

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: UIM Aquabike World Championship 2025
programme.sub-title: GP of Italy, Ski Division, Olbia

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: In this episode of the TT2024 we are bringing the second race of the super athletes and the super twins in a double pack. The opportunity for Hicky and Davey to counter and for Michael Dunlop to further increase his record winning account at the TT. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg takes the audience to the Klassikwelt Bodensee in Friedrichshafen, an event that is much more than a classic car fair. In addition to vintage and youngtimers, visitors can expect a varied program with demonstration drives of historic racing cars, an air show, a historic paddock and numerous encounters with collectors, racing drivers and enthusiasts. Top Speed ​​discovers why the Klassikwelt Bodensee is one of the most diverse classical events in Europe. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg takes part in the Spalatin Historic, a one-day classic car rally in aid of a good cause. Together with organizer Stefan von Heyden, Martin discovers the Franconian region. During the various breaks, entertaining special stages ensure many smiling faces among participants and spectators. In this program, Top Speed ​​also takes viewers to Lucerne, where Martin gets involved behind the scenes at a classic car auction by the Oldtimer Galerie Toffen at the Swiss Classic World. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. In 1997 Ferrari celebrated the company's 50th birthday. At that time, Wolfgang Rother followed the Ferrari myth and collected his first driving impressions with the Ferrari 550 Maranello. (Station info).

programme.title: Racing Files
programme.desc: Bitter fights for championship titles, fierce duels for race victories and even disputes between teammates: motorsport has been characterized by feuds since its early days. Even in Formula 1 there are always heated rivalries and duels. The Racing Files looks at the exciting battles for world championship titles in the premier class of formula racing. (Station info).

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 6
programme.desc: Drug crime, house searches, chases: Roadwars accompanies a special unit of the British police. Together with the dog team, they declare war on the thieves in the Thamse Vally. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Their reputation is legendary, rally enthusiasts adore them: the monster rally cars of the so-called Group B. At the beginning of the 80s, a new classification entered rally sport. Only the most serious accidents with dead drivers and fans put an end to the absolute irrationality. Today these cars enjoy cult status and are expensive collector's items. programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Assistance systems that are normal in cars usually seem exotic or even unthinkable on two-wheelers. However, this no longer applies to the blind spot warning system, which BMW is now offering for the first time. Ideal for the dense traffic in big cities, the home territory of the new maxi scooter C 650 GT. We test the new 60 hp large scooter including the assistance system in Valencia and find out in heavy rush hour traffic whether Side View Assist is an annoying paternalism - or perhaps a real help that could soon also come to motorcycles. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by a colorful mix of used cars, some still in good condition, others a little polished, the previous owner has already left his fingerprint here. What is behind these slightly cranky-looking car dealers? In Motorvision TV, people in the automotive profession tell their stories. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: In this episode of the TT2024 we are bringing the second race of the super athletes and the super twins in a double pack. The opportunity for Hicky and Davey to counter and for Michael Dunlop to further increase his record winning account at the TT. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: For the first time, it was possible to look over the shoulders of the developers for five years. From the idea to the finished car. After a design competition, eight models are shortlisted. Eight comparable vehicles will be presented to 500 test customers. A jury will propose two of the models for the final. The last big design decision has been made. Today there is a winner. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: How will we transport goods and people in the future? The pack mules on our roads are also evolving and moving with the times. VW is working with Ford to save costs and pool expertise on the new van. At Volvo, safety has always been a priority – and that also applies to its trucks. And 5 exciting facts about the Mercedes eCitaro NMC4. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Whether Jaguar F-Type, Aston Martin Vanquish Volante or Bentley Continental, English convertibles are elegant and exclusive and, they are fun. English convertibles enjoy cult status all over the world because, after all, the fun of open and fast two-seaters was invented in England. English roadsters offer more sporting spirit than any other, equipped with power, luxury and elegance, they are the most fascinating convertibles of all. Rolls Royce Phantom Drophead, Jaguar F-Type or Aston Martin Vanquish Volante, Dream Cars presents the most breathtaking English convertibles of all time. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The US brand Cadillac from Detroit stands for the American way of drive and exuberant luxury made in the USA. The Cadillac Series 62 Convertible from 1949 was the first US car to have the famous and often quoted tail fins. A beefy V8 engine, automatic transmission and electric top are a given for a Caddy of this era. Classic Ride revives the American Way of Drive with the tailfin monster. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: In addition to the classic Sportback variant, Audi also offers the A3 as a sedan. We subjected this model to extensive practical testing. Also: the Lexus RX, the revised version of the premium SUV from Toyota's luxury brand on the test site in Ibiza. And: Volkswagen is also launching a new model variant of the e-Up! after. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: They are square and angular, round and beautiful. Solid and safe, indestructible and comfortable: The old Swedes from Volvo. Every model is a classic, every model is a car to dream about. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name 'Green Hell'. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: When you glide the car on two tires, that's it, we're on tour. Today in Dinslaken and that is the hometown of the Bosslé Helldrivers and it has been a huge family business for forty years. They show us a crazy stunt show and we're there! (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The coupe shape makes cars sexy. It's partly a question of faith and partly a question of utility whether you choose a classic two-door coupé like the Mercedes E400 - or the big brother CLS with four doors. The trendsetter of the coupé-limousine has had a number of imitators. The VW Arteon competes with the CLS in a different price segment. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. Today a treat for sports car connoisseurs: the Aston Martin V8 Vantage, the British coupé in the spotlight. And an insight into a life on two wheels: Ernst Jakob Henne set 76 world speed records on BMW machines. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. We show you what you can do and how to do it. Lotus blossoms, lowriders and lascivious sluts - these are among the topics in tuning today. The test team goes full throttle again and chases the Komo-Tec Elise with 230 hp on the Nordschleife. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: This episode of Stunt Heroes is all about stunt driver Christoph Knobloch called Knobi. He drives over a ramp at 50 km/h and crashes into cars stacked on top of each other. The dangerous thing about the stunt: several gasoline barrels explode at the same time! If something goes wrong, Knobi is also in danger.... (channel info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: At the Retro Classics in Stuttgart, presenter Martin Utberg is one of the crowd pullers at the trade fair with his daily stage talks in Hall 10. He welcomes two prominent guests per day in front of a large live audience and talks to them about motorsport, personal experiences and the fascination of classic automobiles. In part 2, Martin speaks to several guests. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: From racetrack legends to sporty luxury road cruisers: no automobile manufacturer manages the balancing act between driving pleasure and comfort as well as BMW. With 550 hp and lightweight construction, the M4 CSL is a race track icon. We test it and show its story. What does the BMW M760e stand for? The power says driver's sedan! The luxurious furnishings speak for danger. We'll find out. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: The highlight of every TT, the Senior TT. Hicky is considered the favorite, but 6 rounds have to be completed first. Can Harrison crack it this time or will Michael Dunlop rise from the ashes like Phoenix after 2 Supersport wins this week? Questions about questions – they are answered here. (Station info).

programme.title: Icelandic Formula Offroad 2025
programme.desc: Formula Off Road was invented in Iceland. Hoping to raise more money for the Icelandic rescue teams, the teams began showing their 4WD cars in action in the Icelandic hills. (Station info).

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 6
programme.desc: Drug crime, house searches, chases: Roadwars accompanies a special unit of the British police. Together with the dog team, they declare war on the thieves in the Thamse Vally. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. Today a treat for sports car connoisseurs: the Aston Martin V8 Vantage, the British coupé in the spotlight. And an insight into a life on two wheels: Ernst Jakob Henne set 76 world speed records on BMW machines. (Station info).

programme.title: Going Pro 2026
programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel info).

programme.title: Fastzone 2026
programme.desc: The show takes the audience into the fascinating world of international racing. The format combines thrilling motorsport action with in-depth analysis and provides a comprehensive overview of important racing series around the globe. In addition to spectacular scenes on the track, the format offers exciting background reports, technical insights and stories about drivers, teams and their challenges. This creates a diverse look at speed, competition and the passion that drives motorsport worldwide. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Today's show is all about: premium performance. Because these two crackers deliver both in their own, unique way and with future-oriented drives. We were exclusively at the world premiere of the Mercedes CLA in Rome and revealed all the details about design, technology and features. Also: Six exciting facts about the ultimate station wagon, the BMW M5 Touring! (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: The highlight of every TT, the Senior TT. Hicky is considered the favorite, but 6 rounds have to be completed first. Can Harrison crack it this time or will Michael Dunlop rise from the ashes like Phoenix after 2 Supersport wins this week? Questions about questions – they are answered here. (Station info).

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: FIM Supermoto World and European Championship 2026
King of the Roads 2024
programme.desc: Kind of the Roads is a motorcycle road racing series where riders reach speeds of up to 200 mph (channel info).

programme.title: Icelandic Formula Offroad 2025
programme.desc: Formula Off Road was invented in Iceland. Hoping to raise more money for the Icelandic rescue teams, the teams began showing their 4WD cars in action in the Icelandic hills. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 6
programme.desc: Drug crime, house searches, chases: Roadwars accompanies a special unit of the British police. Together with the dog team, they declare war on the thieves in the Thamse Vally. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg takes part in the Spalatin Historic, a one-day classic car rally in aid of a good cause. Together with organizer Stefan von Heyden, Martin discovers the Franconian region. During the various breaks, entertaining special stages ensure many smiling faces among participants and spectators. In this program, Top Speed ​​also takes viewers to Lucerne, where Martin gets involved behind the scenes at a classic car auction by the Oldtimer Galerie Toffen at the Swiss Classic World. (Station info).

programme.title: Racing Files
programme.desc: Bitter fights for championship titles, fierce duels for race victories and even disputes between teammates: motorsport has been characterized by feuds since its early days. Even in Formula 1 there are always heated rivalries and duels. The Racing Files looks at the exciting battles for world championship titles in the premier class of formula racing. (Station info).

programme.sub-title: Firestone GP of St. Petersburg, Streets of St. Petersburg, Florida

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: Another total cancellation of the race day on the Isle of Man due to the weather, but instead we had the opportunity to talk in more detail with the Crowe brothers and Davey Todd and take a look back at the most spectacular races of the week. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: With the first Supersport race shortened to 3 laps, the question was whether Hicky could once again demonstrate his dominance from the Superbike race, whether Lee Johnston could repeat his success from last year or whether Michael Dunlup would live up to his role as favorite here. It was a hot fight! (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: Would Superstock racing become a blueprint for Superbike racing? With another dominant performance from Hicky? The experts didn't really agree on this. A race full of surprises and an interesting podium. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: It was actually supposed to be the final day, but in the end only the super athletes and sidecars started, while the senior was postponed to the next day. However, history was written once again in the extremely competitive second super sports race. (Station info).

programme.desc: The IMSA WeatherTech SportsCar Championship is an endurance championship in North America in which up to five different classes compete against each other in eleven events (channel info).
